English: I am impressed! Atrox are dangerous beasts known to cut down most creatures that approach them. You have proven yourself.
Traditional_Chinese: 我很佩服你！巨齒蛉 是危險的野獸，大多數接近牠們的生物都會被撕碎。你已經證明了自己。

English: Atrox are dangerous foes, you'll need to successfully defeat more of them to prove yourself to me.
Traditional_Chinese: 巨齒蛉 是很危險的對手。你得再擊敗更多牠們，才能向我證明自己。

English: Defeat 200 of any kind of Atrox, then return to Sunny Pang.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗任意 200 隻 巨齒蛉，然後回來找 陽光胖胖。

English: Clear the Paths
Traditional_Chinese: 清理道路

English: Word has been going around the village about a strong new visitor that can hold their own against the ferocities of Coral Island.
Traditional_Chinese: 村裡都在傳，來了一位強大的新訪客，足以獨自面對珊瑚島上的兇猛威脅。

English: The number of Tigars on the island have exploded recently, and we're not sure why. It's hardly safe to walk along the paths of Coral Island anymore.
Traditional_Chinese: 最近島上的提卡數量暴增，我們也不知道原因。現在連走在珊瑚島的小路上都幾乎不安全了。

English: If you are willing to help us, go hunt enough Tigars to keep our paths safe for a while. Around 300 should do.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你願意幫助我們，就去獵殺足夠的提卡，讓道路暫時恢復安全吧。大約 300 隻應該就夠了。

English: Perhaps no one is powerful enough to defeat the Tigars.
Traditional_Chinese: 也許根本沒有人強大到能擊敗那些提卡。

English: Incredible, thank you for your efforts! We can safely travel around the land paths of the island again.
Traditional_Chinese: 太厲害了，謝謝你的努力！現在我們又能安全地在島上的陸地道路間往來了。

English: Tigars hide in the grass, waiting to strike their prey. In just one NaNosecond they pounce to attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 提卡潛伏在草叢裡，等待襲擊獵物。只要一眨眼的工夫，牠們就會猛撲上來攻擊。

English: Defeat 300 of any kind of Tigar, then return to Talus.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗任意種類的提卡 300 隻，然後回去找塔盧斯。

English: Pirates and Their Pet
Traditional_Chinese: 海盜與他們的寵物

English: Your reputation continues to grow in our little village, hero!
Traditional_Chinese: 英雄啊，你在我們這個小村莊裡的名聲愈來愈響亮了！

English: The Meral pirates of Coral Island have managed to tame a Lord Tigar. Those thieves have threatened to come rob and destroy our homes.
Traditional_Chinese: 珊瑚島上的梅拉爾海盜竟然馴服了一隻提卡領主。那些盜匪還威脅說要來洗劫並摧毀我們的家園。

English: Defeat the pirates and their gigantic pet before they destroy everything we've built!
Traditional_Chinese: 在海盜和他們那隻巨大的寵物毀掉我們辛苦建立的一切之前，先擊敗他們吧！

English: I wouldn't want to be eaten by a Lord Tigar either. Understandable.
Traditional_Chinese: 我也不想被提卡領主吃掉。能理解。

English: I knew you could do it, hero! For now we can rest, knowing that our village is safe from the Meral pirates and their Lord Tigar!
Traditional_Chinese: 我就知道你辦得到，英雄！至少現在，我們可以安心休息，知道村莊暫時安全，不必再害怕梅拉爾海盜和那隻提卡領主了！

English: Merals and their pet Tigar are terribly powerful. You'll need to be strong to defeat them.
Traditional_Chinese: 梅拉爾和他們的提卡寵物都非常強大。想擊敗他們，你也得夠強才行。

English: Collect 30 Pristine Pirate Lens from any kind of Meral, and a Gigantic Feline Fang from a Lord Tigar.
Traditional_Chinese: 從任意種類的梅拉爾身上收集 30 個潔淨海盜鏡片，並從提卡領主身上取得 1 顆巨型貓科獠牙。

English: King of the Pirates!
Traditional_Chinese: 海盜之王！

English: Woaw, welcome to Coral Island hero! Let me tell you a story of legend, if you don't mind.
Traditional_Chinese: 哇喔，歡迎來到珊瑚島，英雄！如果你不介意，讓我告訴你一段傳說故事。

English: Long ago, a huge Meral was once blessed by Shade. The Meral grew twisted and grotesque, but filled with dark power.
Traditional_Chinese: 很久以前，一隻巨大的梅拉爾曾受到夏德的祝福。牠因此變得扭曲而醜陋，卻也充滿了黑暗的力量。

English: Soon the Overlord Meral became the King of the Pirates of Coral Island, ruling with an iron hook.
Traditional_Chinese: 沒過多久，霸王梅拉爾便成了珊瑚島海盜之王，以鐵鉤般的手段統治一切。

English: Wehehehe, if you defeated that Overlord Meral maybe YOU could become King of the Pirates!
Traditional_Chinese: 嘿嘿嘿，如果你擊敗那個霸王梅拉爾，說不定你就能成為新的海盜之王！

English: I guess we will never know if the legend of the Meral King is true.
Traditional_Chinese: 看來我們永遠無法知道梅拉爾王的傳說是否屬實了。

English: Woah woah woah! You defeated the King of the Pirates? And that stone...
Traditional_Chinese: 哇、哇、哇！你竟然打倒了海盜之王？還有那顆石頭……

English: It seems this one piece of stone is filled with purple magic... this is definitely the work of Shade.
Traditional_Chinese: 看來這塊石頭碎片裡充滿了紫色魔力……這肯定是夏德的手筆。

English: Fufufu, the only thing that bothers me is that there is legend of a second piece of magic stone hidden on this island. Maybe one day the two of us will discover where it's hiding!
Traditional_Chinese: 呵呵呵，唯一讓我在意的是，傳說中這座島上還藏著第二塊魔法石。也許總有一天，我們兩個會一起找出它藏在哪裡！

English: To find out if the legend is true, you'll need to defeat the Overlord Meral.
Traditional_Chinese: 想知道這個傳說是不是真的，你就得先擊敗霸王梅拉爾。

English: Defeat the Overlord Meral to collect the Purple Pirate Insignia.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗霸王梅拉爾，取得紫色海盜徽記。

English: Island Delicacies
Traditional_Chinese: 島嶼珍饈

English: Ha! You have really made a name for yourself here on Coral Island, hero. Everyone has told me of the amazing feats you've accomplished.
Traditional_Chinese: 哈！英雄，你在珊瑚島上真的闖出名號了。大家都在說你完成了多麼驚人的壯舉。

English: If you want to prove yourself further, help us defeat the legion of Naga that have taken over the island.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你還想更進一步證明自己，就幫我們擊敗那些佔據整座島的納迦軍團吧。

English: To safely take on the Naga, first you'll need to gather bait made of their favorite foods. You can make bait from any type of Kingster or Creper! Meet up with Pau Pau and he'll prepare everything.
Traditional_Chinese: 為了安全地對付那迦，首先你需要收集他們最喜歡的食物製成的誘餌。您可以用任何類型的金斯特或克雷普製作魚餌！與包包會面，他會準備好一切。

English: Everyone's adventure comes to a close one day. That's alright, hero.
Traditional_Chinese: 每個人的冒險總有一天會畫下句點。沒關係的，英雄。

English: Woaw, nice job hero! We can make plenty of bait with all this to lower the guard of the Naga! For now, take a rest. We'll make a plan of attack later.
Traditional_Chinese: 哇喔，幹得漂亮，英雄！有了這些，我們就能製作大量誘餌，來降低納迦的警戒！先休息一下吧，之後我們再擬定進攻計畫。

English: Keep fighting Kingster or Creper until you've found enough bait.
Traditional_Chinese: 繼續與金斯特或克雷普戰鬥，直到找到足夠的誘餌。

English: Defeat any kind of Kingster or Creper until you've made 200 Island Bait.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗任何種類的金斯特或克雷普，直到製作 200 個島嶼魚餌。

English: Lizard People
Traditional_Chinese: 蜥蜴人

English: I hope you're feeling rested after making all that bait with Pau Pau!
Traditional_Chinese: 我希望您在用包包製作了所有誘餌後感到要休息了！

English: It's time to go on the offensive and take down as many of the Naga as we can.
Traditional_Chinese: 是時候主動出擊，盡可能多消滅一些納迦了。

English: Okay hero, go out there and defeat the Naga before they come eat us!
Traditional_Chinese: 好，英雄，出發吧！在納迦跑來把我們吃掉之前，先把牠們擊敗！

English: The Naga are ferocious, there's no shame in saying no.
Traditional_Chinese: 納迦非常兇猛，說不想去也沒什麼好丟臉的。

English: Incredible! Truly amazing! You've conquered the Naga, and nearly all of Coral Island!
Traditional_Chinese: 太驚人了！真是了不起！你征服了納迦，也幾乎征服了整座珊瑚島！

English: Hopefully soon our village can sleep without keeping one eye open.
Traditional_Chinese: 希望不久之後，我們村莊終於能不必提心吊膽地入睡。

English: Keep going! You need to defeat more Naga.
Traditional_Chinese: 繼續吧！你還需要擊敗更多納迦。

English: Collect evidence of defeating at least 1000 Small Naga, Naga, or Captain Naga. After that, defeat the Lord Naga and Overlord Naga.
Traditional_Chinese: 收集至少擊敗 1000 隻小納迦、納迦或納迦隊長的證明，之後再擊敗納迦領主與霸王納迦。

English: Mission Improbable
Traditional_Chinese: 不可能的任務

English: Hahaha! I cannot thank you enough for all that you have done for our village, hero! Only the most powerful of masquerpets remain a threat to our village now.
Traditional_Chinese: 哈哈哈！英雄，真不知道該怎麼感謝你為我們村莊所做的一切！如今只剩下最強大的變身怪物還能威脅我們村莊了。

English: We rarely see the Dorian and Okean creatures approach the village. However with so many other Island evils defeated, I fear they may leave their lair to take advantage of the situation!
Traditional_Chinese: 我們很少看到多利安和奧肯怪物接近村莊。然而，隨著如此多的島嶼邪惡勢力被擊敗，我擔心他們可能會離開巢穴來乘虛而入！

English: Go seek out where the Dorian and Okean live. We'll need as much information as we can get if we expect to defeat them!
Traditional_Chinese: 去尋找多利安人和奧肯人居住的地方。如果我們想要擊敗他們，我們需要更多的資訊！

English: What!? You can't possibly be scared of a few more masquerpets after all we've been through together!
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼！？經過我們一起經歷了這麼多之後，你該不會還會怕那幾隻變身怪物吧！

English: Well done, hero! With this information we have a chance to defeat the Dorian and Okean before they can attack!
Traditional_Chinese: 作得好，英雄！有了這些訊息，我們就有機會在多利安人和奧肯人進攻之前擊敗他們！

English: Keep searching, the Dorian and Okean make their homes in the waters of Coral Island.
Traditional_Chinese: 繼續尋找，多利安人和奧肯人在珊瑚島的水域安了家。

English: Search for where the Dorian and Okean live.
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找多利安人和奧肯人居住的地方。

English: Surprise Attack!
Traditional_Chinese: 奇襲！

English: HOOWAH! I'm trembling with excitement!
Traditional_Chinese: 吼哇！我興奮得都在發抖了！

English: With the information you've brought back, our village has a real chance to take down the Dorian and Okean before they get to us!
Traditional_Chinese: 有了你帶回來的訊息，我們村莊就有機會在多利安人和奧肯人到達我們面前之前幹掉他們！

English: Go ahead and defeat as many Dorian and Okean as you can find, including their leaders! We trust you to take down the leaders, we'll be helping with the smaller ones in the back.
Traditional_Chinese: 繼續吧，擊敗更多的多利安和奧肯，包括他們的頭目！我們相信你能打倒頭目，我們會幫助後面的較小的怪物。

English: If we wait too much longer the Dorian and Okean will attack the village!
Traditional_Chinese: 如果再拖下去，多利安和歐肯就要攻擊村莊了！

English: It's been done, hero. We've defeated the Dorian and Okean, and can now rest easy.
Traditional_Chinese: 已經完成了，英雄。我們已經擊敗了多利安人和奧肯人，現在可以高枕無憂了。

English: We're doomed... without your help we will never defeat the Dorian and Okean in time!
Traditional_Chinese: 我們完了……沒有你的幫助，我們根本來不及擊敗多利安和歐肯！

English: Collect trophies from any defeated Dorian and Okean, and defeat at least one Lord or Overlord of each!
Traditional_Chinese: 蒐集任意被擊敗的 多利安 與 皇冠海妖 的戰利品，並至少擊敗各自 1 隻 Lord 或 Overlord！

English: Inky Darkness
Traditional_Chinese: 墨色黑暗

English: I hope you are ready for our final challenge hero... According to legend, once every few hundred years the Sea King will release spawn onto Coral Island.
Traditional_Chinese: 希望你已經準備好迎接我們最後的挑戰了，英雄……根據傳說，每隔幾百年，海王就會在珊瑚島釋出牠的子嗣。

English: A strange darkness has began to fill the waters of Coral Island, so it seems as if the legend is true.
Traditional_Chinese: 一股詭異的黑暗已開始籠罩珊瑚島的海域，看來那則傳說是真的。

English: Please help us stave off the spawn of the Sea King!
Traditional_Chinese: 請幫助我們阻止海王的子嗣！

English: Thank you! Find where the Sea King has released their spawn, and defeat as many as you can. Let BoBu know once you've finished!
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你！去找出海王釋出子嗣的地方，盡可能擊敗牠們。完成後再告訴 波布。

English: Soon the inky darkness will overflow Coral Island, and we will be engulfed...
Traditional_Chinese: 不久之後，墨一般的黑暗就會淹沒整座珊瑚島，而我們也將被吞噬……

English: Hohoho! You really do have a mysterious power within you, don't you hero?
Traditional_Chinese: 呵呵呵！你體內果然蘊藏著一股神秘的力量，不是嗎，英雄？

English: Will we become faceless like those that failed before us?
Traditional_Chinese: 我們會變得像那些失敗者一樣失去面容嗎？

English: Defeat 500 of any type of Kraken.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗任意 500 隻 克拉肯。

English: The Sea King Returns
Traditional_Chinese: 海王歸來

English: The great Sea King of Coral Island has finally returned to wreck havoc upon the land.
Traditional_Chinese: 珊瑚島偉大的海王終於再度歸來，準備對這片土地肆虐。

English: The locals told me that getting near the beast could cause mortals to lose their mind...
Traditional_Chinese: 當地人告訴我，只要接近那頭怪物，就可能讓凡人失去理智……

English: This battle will take all the strength we can muster. If you make it out alive, go back to Darken City, and let the mayor know about all that happened here.
Traditional_Chinese: 這場戰鬥需要我們傾盡所有力量。如果你能活著回來，就回得肯城，把這裡發生的一切告訴市長。

English: The only path forward to end the curse of the Sea King is to slay the beast in its lair. Go forth and do the deed, for Coral Island!
Traditional_Chinese: 要終結海王詛咒的唯一方法，就是在牠的巢穴中將其斬殺。為了珊瑚島，前去完成這件事吧！

English: Those who lose their mind to the Sea King are said to become faceless.
Traditional_Chinese: 據說凡是因海王而失去理智的人，最後都會變成無面者。

English: Welcome back from Coral Island, hero! And what a story to tell, it's true that Coral Island is a fascinating place.
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎從珊瑚島歸來，英雄！而且這故事可真精彩，珊瑚島果然是個令人著迷的地方。

English: BoBu and the Coral Island villagers sent something by mail for you as a way to say thanks. Perhaps they were too shy to give it to you themselves!
Traditional_Chinese: 波布 和珊瑚島的村民寄了些東西給你，作為感謝。也許他們只是太害羞，不敢當面交給你！

English: The Sea King consumes all who look into the void.
Traditional_Chinese: 海王會吞噬所有凝視虛無之人。

English: Ultimate Crafting
Traditional_Chinese: 究極製作

English: Orbs of Power
Traditional_Chinese: 力量寶珠

English: Your arrival has come at a critical time, hero. Bring me Ultima, and in return I shall grant you the key to ultimate power.
Traditional_Chinese: 你的到來正是關鍵時刻，英雄。把終極精粹帶給我，作為交換，我將賜予你通往究極力量的鑰匙。

English: Collect Ultima from the giant creatures that live on Coral Island, or from chests of plunder deep in The Wilds.
Traditional_Chinese: 從珊瑚島上的巨型生物，或荒野叢境深處的掠奪寶箱中蒐集終極精粹。

English: Without Ultima I cannot grant the ultimate power you seek.
Traditional_Chinese: 沒有終極精粹，我就無法賜予你所追求的究極力量。

English: Well done, hero... I bestow upon you the power of the Ultimate Orb. Combine this with Shining Oricalkum and obtain ultimate power!
Traditional_Chinese: 做得好，英雄……我現在將終極寶珠的力量賜予你。把它與閃耀奧里哈鋼結合，獲得究極之力吧！

English: I need more Ultima to complete the ritual.
Traditional_Chinese: 我還需要更多終極精粹才能完成儀式。

English: Collect ten Ultima from the giants of Coral Island and treasure chests in The Wilds.
Traditional_Chinese: 從珊瑚島的巨人和荒野叢境的寶箱中蒐集十個終極精粹。

English: New Hero
Traditional_Chinese: 新的英雄

English: Your will and ability have proven you to be a master in both thought and deed. Now that you've shown your true strength, it is time for your final task.
Traditional_Chinese: 你的意志與能力已證明你無論在思想還是行動上都已臻於大師之境。既然你已展現真正的實力，現在就是迎接最終任務的時候了。

English: I need you to reach level 125 and bring $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$. Only a real Hero can do that!
Traditional_Chinese: 我要你達到 125 級，並帶來 $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$。只有真正的 Hero 才做得到！

English: Reach level 125 and bring $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$.
Traditional_Chinese: 達到 125 級，並帶來 $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$。

English: New Year's Hunt
Traditional_Chinese: 新年狩獵

English: Celebrating 2024, let's hunt 2024 monsters!\nWhat do you say?"
Traditional_Chinese: 為了慶祝 2024，一起去獵殺 2024 隻怪物吧！\n你覺得如何？

English: "Great! I know you'll make it for sure!\nHere's to a new year full of adventures in 2024!!!"
Traditional_Chinese: 太好了！我就知道你一定辦得到！\n敬 2024 年滿滿的冒險新篇章！！！

English: "It's a shame, because I've got the best New Year's gift ever…"
Traditional_Chinese: 真可惜，因為我手上可是有最棒的新年禮物……

English: "You've done great~ Here's your New Year's gift~\nLet's see how lucky you are this year!!!"
Traditional_Chinese: 你做得很棒～這是你的新年禮物～\n來看看你今年的運氣有多好吧！！！

English: "Are you still a long way off? We're running out of time! Please hurry up!"
Traditional_Chinese: 你還差很遠嗎？時間快不夠了！請快一點！

English: Defeat the monsters and return to Auxilior.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗怪物後回到 輔助者 身邊。

English: Collecting Candy Shells
Traditional_Chinese: 收集糖果碎殼

English: Madrigal is being polluted by discarded candy shells everywhere!! We need your help!!
Traditional_Chinese: 瑪德利賈到處都被丟棄的糖果包裝汙染了！！我們需要你的幫助！！

English: Thank you so much!! I won't forget your help!!
Traditional_Chinese: 真的非常感謝你！！我不會忘記你的幫忙！！

English: I have a special gift for you, but it's a shame...
Traditional_Chinese: 我有一份特別禮物想送你，可惜……

English: I'm so proud to see Madrigal cleaned up~!
Traditional_Chinese: 看到瑪德利賈被清理乾淨，我真的好驕傲～！

English: Hang in there!!
Traditional_Chinese: 再加把勁！！

English: Collect the candy shells and return to Auxilior.
Traditional_Chinese: 收集糖果殼後回到 輔助者 身邊。

English: Spring Monster Ball
Traditional_Chinese: 春季怪物球

English: Hello Adventurer! Would you like to take a suggestion about hunting a stronger monster?
Traditional_Chinese: 你好，冒險者！想不想聽聽看關於狩獵更強怪物的建議？

English: Great! Show me what you can do first!
Traditional_Chinese: 太好了！先讓我看看你的本事吧！

English: That's too bad, please join us next time!
Traditional_Chinese: 太可惜了，請下次再來參加吧！

English: Thank you. Here is your Monster Ball. Please be cautious!\nNo one knows what kind of powerful monster will come out.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝。這是你的怪物球，請務必小心！\n沒有人知道裡面會跑出什麼樣的強大怪物。

English: Are we there yet? We don't have much time.
Traditional_Chinese: 還沒好嗎？我們時間不多了。

English: Complete all 3 missions.
Traditional_Chinese: 完成全部 3 個任務。

English: Couple Ring Hunt
Traditional_Chinese: 情侶戒指狩獵

English: If you bring me the coupling, I will give you something really good. Go get it.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你把情侶戒拿來給我，我就給你很棒的東西。快去拿來吧。

English: Thanks for granting my request. I've heard through the grapevine that there's been a lot of frauds playing with fake couple rings lately, so you'd better be careful.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你答應我的請求。我聽說最近有不少騙子拿假情侶戒招搖撞騙，所以你最好多加小心。

English: What? Where in the world is such a couple ring? So you're saying I'm lying? If you don't believe me, get off!
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？世上哪有那種情侶戒？你是說我在騙人嗎？不信就滾開！

English: Did you manage to get the couple ring already? This is a fake! Didn't I warn you not to get scammed. But I'm giving it to you for your efforts, so take it.
Traditional_Chinese: 你已經拿到情侶戒了嗎？這是假的！我不是早就警告過你別被騙嗎？不過看在你辛苦一場的份上，這個還是給你，拿去吧。

English: Still haven't found the coupling? Hmm...well, that could be... I mean, where would a legendary couple ring be so easy to find?
Traditional_Chinese: 還沒找到情侶戒嗎？嗯……也是啦……傳說級的情侶戒哪有那麼容易找到。

English: Hunt the monsters and gather couple rings!
Traditional_Chinese: 狩獵怪物並收集情侶戒！

English: Roll your dice
Traditional_Chinese: 擲出你的骰子

English: Complete all missions.
Traditional_Chinese: 完成所有任務。

English: Couple Daily Quests
Traditional_Chinese: 情侶每日任務

English: Hunt the monsters and gather couple rings!
Traditional_Chinese: 狩獵怪物並收集情侶戒！

English: I'm so glad to see how in love you are. Go collect $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ from the Nyangnyangs in northern Flaris, then return to me.
Traditional_Chinese: 看到你們這麼相愛，我真是太高興了。去北部布拉里斯從喵喵怪身上收集 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$，再回來找我吧。

English: I can feel these charms emitting love waves. Soon everyone will know how special your love is!
Traditional_Chinese: 我能感受到這些護符正散發著愛的波動。很快所有人都會知道你們的愛有多特別！

English: I'm sorry, were you unable to find the $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$? Perhaps they only appear for those truly in love.
Traditional_Chinese: 抱歉，你沒能找到 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ 嗎？也許它只會出現在真正相愛的人面前。

English: Bring $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ back to me to prove the strength of your love!
Traditional_Chinese: 把 $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ 帶回來給我，證明你們愛情的力量！

English: Kill Demian Thieves
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗迪米安盜賊

English: Welcome! Another request has come in to clear out $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$. Could you please work together to defeat the $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$, and return to me once you are done?
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎！又有一項委託要清除 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$。你願意和你的情侶一起擊敗 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$，完成後再回來找我嗎？

English: The $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ has been spotted somewhere in Madrigal. Check your map for hints for where they may be hiding!
Traditional_Chinese: 有人在瑪德利賈某處發現了 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$。查看地圖，或許能找到牠們藏身的位置！

English: The power of your love have vanquished the $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ threat, thank you!
Traditional_Chinese: 你們愛情的力量已經消滅了 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ 的威脅，謝謝你們！

English: Were you unable to find and defeat $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ yet? Track them down to prove your love is true!
Traditional_Chinese: 你們還沒找到並擊敗 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ 嗎？快去追蹤牠們，證明你們的愛是真的！

English: Find Love Fish
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找愛情魚

English: Have you heard of the legendary $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$? Legend has it that lovers who obtain the $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ will be together forever.
Traditional_Chinese: 你聽過傳說中的 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ 嗎？傳說只要戀人得到 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$，就能永遠在一起。

English: Wonderful! The $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ is said to swim near Zaoma's Refuge in the middle of the Leren Mountains.
Traditional_Chinese: 太好了！據說 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ 會在勒倫山脈中央的薩奧瑪避難所附近出沒。

English: You've found the $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$! Surely your love will be blessed to last forever.
Traditional_Chinese: 你們找到 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ 了！你們的愛一定會受到祝福，直到永遠。

English: I don't see the $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$. If you have trouble finding it, search near Zaoma in the Leren Mountains.
Traditional_Chinese: 我沒看到 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$。如果找不到，就到勒倫山脈薩奧瑪附近再仔細找找。

English: Bring $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ back to me to prove the strength of your love!
Traditional_Chinese: 把 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ 帶回來給我，證明你們愛情的力量！

English: Kill Giggle Boxes
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗笑笑箱

English: Kill Trangfoma
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗特蘭格弗瑪

English: Kill Doridoma
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗多利多瑪

English: Kill Scorpicon
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗蠍尾獅

English: Kill Tombstone Bearer
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗墓碑搬運者

English: Kill Cardpuppets
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗卡片木偶

English: Kill Steam Walkers
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗蒸汽機甲

English: Kill Nutty Wheels
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗瘋輪

English: Kill Fefern
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗菲菲恩

English: Kill Wagsaac
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗瓦格薩克

English: Kill Prankster
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗惡作劇者

English: Collect Whispering Leaves from Risem
Traditional_Chinese: 從里森收集低語樹葉

English: In their spare time, Risems collect leaves that whisper sweet nothings. Spread love around Madrigal by bringing these $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ back to me!
Traditional_Chinese: 閒暇時，里森姆會收集那些低語情話的葉子。把這些 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ 帶回來給我，將愛散播到整個瑪德利賈吧！

English: I'm so glad to see how in love you are. Go collect $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$ from the Risems in Darken, then return to me.
Traditional_Chinese: 看到你們這麼相愛，我真是太高興了。去得肯從里森姆身上收集 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$，再回來找我吧。

English: Can you hear the leaves speak? Soon everyone will know how special your love is!
Traditional_Chinese: 你聽見那些葉子在說話了嗎？很快所有人都會知道你們的愛有多特別！

English: A Date on Mars!
Traditional_Chinese: 瑪斯約會！

English: What could be more romantic than frolicking near the Bangs of Northern Flaris? A picnic outside of Mars Mine sounds outstanding!
Traditional_Chinese: 還有什麼比在北部布拉里斯的砰砰怪附近嬉戲更浪漫呢？去瑪斯礦坑外野餐聽起來真不錯！

English: Wonderful, then the date is set. Enjoy your time sightseeing at the Mars Mine!
Traditional_Chinese: 太好了，那就這麼約定了。好好享受在瑪斯礦坑觀光約會的時光吧！

English: Not a fan of Bangs? Well, there's always the Nyangnyangs.
Traditional_Chinese: 不喜歡砰砰怪嗎？那還有喵喵怪可選。

English: How was the date? Hopefully the Bangs weren't too distracting.
Traditional_Chinese: 約會如何？希望那些砰砰怪沒有太干擾你們。

English: Oh, so the Bangs were too distracting after all. Maybe you need to take a cold bath?
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，所以砰砰怪果然太礙事了？也許你們該去沖個冷水澡？

English: Go on a romantic date outside the entrance of Mars Mine!
Traditional_Chinese: 在瑪斯礦坑入口外來一場浪漫約會吧！

English: Welcome! Another request has come in to clear out $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$. Could you please slay the $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$, and return to me once you are done?
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎！又有一項清除 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ 的委託。請你擊殺 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$，完成後再回來找我。

English: The $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ has been spotted somewhere in Madrigal.
Traditional_Chinese: 有人在瑪德利賈某處目擊到 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$。

English: Some days we don't feel productive. I understand.
Traditional_Chinese: 有時候提不起勁也很正常，我能理解。

English: Collect Rainbow Flowers
Traditional_Chinese: 收集彩虹花

English: Welcome! We require flowers blessed by lovers. Could you please collect Rainbow Flowers, and return to me once you are done?
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎！我們需要受到戀人祝福的花朵。請去收集彩虹花，完成後再回來找我，好嗎？

English: Wonderful! The rare flowers grow near the large tree in Saint Morning where no one flies.
Traditional_Chinese: 太好了！這種稀有花朵生長在聖音特那棵沒有人飛行的大樹附近。

English: These flowers are perfect. With your help I can now bless all of Madrigal with love!
Traditional_Chinese: 這些花完美無缺。有了你的幫助，我現在就能把愛的祝福散播到整個瑪德利賈！

English: Oh no, that's not right. The flowers are in Saint Morning. If you get lost, remember to check your map!
Traditional_Chinese: 喔不，這不對。那些花在聖音特。如果迷路了，記得打開地圖看看！

English: Head to the Plateau of Silence in Saint Morning, and retrieve the Wild Rainbow Flowers.
Traditional_Chinese: 前往聖音特的寂靜高原，取回野生彩虹花。

English: Collect Heart Charms from Nyangnyang
Traditional_Chinese: 從喵喵收集愛心護符

English: Nyangnyangs possess charms bursting with the power of love. With a few of these charms, you can show Madrigal how strong your love is!
Traditional_Chinese: 裝可愛喵娘 身上帶著充滿愛之力量的護符。只要拿到幾個這樣的護符，你就能向整個瑪德利賈證明你的愛有多麼強烈！

English: The Mystery of the Shady Eye
Traditional_Chinese: 暗影之眼的謎團

English: The Mystery of the Shady Eye (2)
Traditional_Chinese: 暗影之眼的謎團 (2)

English: The Cursed Wing of Destiny
Traditional_Chinese: 被詛咒的命運之翼

English: The Cursed Wing of Destiny (2)
Traditional_Chinese: 被詛咒的命運之翼 (2)

English: The $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ has been spotted on the sixth floor of the Forsaken Tower.
Traditional_Chinese: 有人在深淵之塔第六層發現了 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ 的蹤跡。

English: The $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ has been spotted on the seventh floor of the Forsaken Tower.
Traditional_Chinese: 有人在深淵之塔第七層發現了 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ 的蹤跡。

English: Disarming the Maleficars
Traditional_Chinese: 解除瑪勒菲卡爾的武裝

English: Disarming the Maleficars (2)
Traditional_Chinese: 解除瑪勒菲卡爾的武裝 (2)

English: Stealing gems from the cursed guardian
Traditional_Chinese: 從被詛咒的守護者手中奪取寶石

English: Stealing gems from the cursed guardian (2)
Traditional_Chinese: 從被詛咒的守護者手中奪取寶石 (2)

English: Herbology Class
Traditional_Chinese: 草藥學課程

English: You can gather herbs with a hoe. Want to learn how to gather herbs?
Traditional_Chinese: 你可以用鋤頭採集藥草。想學習採藥嗎？

English: Good. Then go out into the field and try to gather some. It will be a great help, whether you succeed or not.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。那就到野外試著採一些吧。不管成功與否，對你都會很有幫助。

English: There you go. It's easier than you think, isn't it? Just remember, the most important thing is to do 'a lot'.
Traditional_Chinese: 就是這樣。比你想的還簡單，對吧？只要記住，最重要的就是要「多做」。

English: Woodcutting Class
Traditional_Chinese: 伐木課程

English: You can chop trees with an axe. Would you like to learn woodcutting?
Traditional_Chinese: 你可以用斧頭砍樹。想學伐木嗎？

English: Good. Then go out into the field and chop some. It will be a great help, whether you succeed or not.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。那就到野外去砍一些吧。不管成功與否，對你都會很有幫助。

English: Mining Class
Traditional_Chinese: 採礦課程

English: You can dig up ores with a pickaxe. Would you like to learn mining?
Traditional_Chinese: 你可以用十字鎬挖掘礦石。想學採礦嗎？

English: Good. Then go out into the field and try to dig some. It will be a great help, whether you succeed or not.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。那就到野外去試著挖一些吧。不管成功與否，對你都會很有幫助。

English: Fishing Class
Traditional_Chinese: 釣魚課程

English: Once you get to know thrill of fishing, it's hard to get away from it. What do you say, learn?
Traditional_Chinese: 一旦你體會到釣魚的樂趣，就很難抽身了。怎麼樣，要學嗎？

English: Good. Then go to the nearest river and try fishing. Whether you succeed or fail, it'll help you a lot.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。那就去最近的河邊試著釣魚吧。無論成功還是失敗，都會對你很有幫助。

English: Alchemy Class
Traditional_Chinese: 煉金課程

English: Once you learn the alchemy, you can brew your own buff potion to carry with. Want to learn?
Traditional_Chinese: 學會煉金術後，你就能自己調製隨身攜帶的增益藥水。想學嗎？

English: Good. Try anything on the caldron nearby. Caldron is near the magic shop.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。去試試附近的大鍋吧。大鍋就在魔法店附近。

English: Cooking Class
Traditional_Chinese: 烹飪課程

English: Food is the basic of survival. Why don't you cook on your own?
Traditional_Chinese: 食物是生存的基本。要不要試著自己下廚？

English: Good. Try anything on the oven nearby. Oven is near the food shop.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。去試試附近的烤爐吧。烤爐就在餐飲店附近。

English: Carpentry Class
Traditional_Chinese: 木工課程

English: You can make furniture out of wood. Would you like to learn carpenting?
Traditional_Chinese: 你可以用木頭製作家具。想學木工嗎？

English: Okay, try anything on the woodcutting tools nearby. The woodcutting tools are near the Housing Manager.
Traditional_Chinese: 好，去試試附近的木工工具吧。木工工具就在住宅管理員附近。

English: Smithing Class
Traditional_Chinese: 鍛造課程

English: You can make furniture out of wood. Would you like to learn carpenting?
Traditional_Chinese: 你可以用木頭製作家具。想學木工嗎？

English: Okay, try anything at the nearest crafting tool. The tools are near the jewelry.
Traditional_Chinese: 好，去最近的製作工具那邊試試看。工具就在首飾店附近。

English: Destroy the pumpkins 1
Traditional_Chinese: 摧毀南瓜 1

English: Complete the mission.
Traditional_Chinese: 完成任務。

English: Destroy the pumpkins 2
Traditional_Chinese: 摧毀南瓜 2

English: Complete the mission.
Traditional_Chinese: 完成任務。

English: Thanksgiving Turkey
Traditional_Chinese: 感恩節火雞

English: Help the mayor cook his turkey for thanksgiving.\nHunt monsters (Lv. -10 to Lv. +10 from your level) to earn [Event] Turkeys.
Traditional_Chinese: 幫市長在感恩節前把火雞料理完成。\n獵殺怪物 (等級在你等級 -10 到 +10 之間) 來獲得 [Event] 火雞。

English: Hello, adventurer! I'm planning to cook a turkey for the village. Do you have a moment to help?
Traditional_Chinese: 你好，冒險者！我正打算為村子裡準備一隻感恩節火雞，你現在方便幫個忙嗎？

English: Great! Actually, I tried to cook it myself, but while I left the ingredients outside, monsters stole them all! Can you help me get them back?
Traditional_Chinese: 太好了！其實我本來想自己料理，但我把材料放在外面時，全都被怪物偷走了！你能幫我把它們找回來嗎？

English: That's a shame. I'll try to figure something out on my own.
Traditional_Chinese: 真可惜。我只好自己再想辦法了。

English: Thank you so much! I can finish cooking in time. Happy Thanksgiving!
Traditional_Chinese: 真的太感謝你了！這下我能及時把料理完成了。感恩節快樂！

English: Are you done yet? The villagers are eagerly waiting!
Traditional_Chinese: 你還沒好嗎？村民們都在等著呢！

English: Go out into the field and try to gather some. It will be a great help, whether you succeed or not.
Traditional_Chinese: 到野外試著採集一些吧。不管成功與否，對你都會很有幫助。

English: Go out into the field and chop some. It will be a great help, whether you succeed or not.
Traditional_Chinese: 到野外去砍一些吧。不管成功與否，對你都會很有幫助。

English: Go out into the field and try to dig some. It will be a great help, whether you succeed or not.
Traditional_Chinese: 到野外去試著挖一些吧。不管成功與否，對你都會很有幫助。

English: Go to the nearest river and try fishing. Whether you succeed or fail, it'll help you a lot.
Traditional_Chinese: 去最近的河邊試著釣魚吧。無論成功與否，都會對你很有幫助。

English: Try anything on the caldron nearby. Caldron is near the magic shop.
Traditional_Chinese: 去試試附近的大鍋吧。大鍋就在魔法店附近。

English: Try anything on the oven nearby. Oven is near the food shop.
Traditional_Chinese: 去試試附近的烤爐吧。烤爐就在餐飲店附近。

English: Try anything on the woodcutting tools nearby. The woodcutting tools are near the Housing Manager.
Traditional_Chinese: 去試試附近的木工工具吧。木工工具就在住宅管理員附近。

English: Try anything at the nearest crafting tool. The tools are near the jewelry.
Traditional_Chinese: 去最近的製作工具那邊試試看。工具就在首飾店附近。

English: Hero Grade (2)
Traditional_Chinese: 英雄等級 (2)

English: I need you to reach level 140 and bring $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$. Only a real Hero can do that!
Traditional_Chinese: 我要你達到 140 級，並帶來 $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$。只有真正的 Hero 才做得到！

English: Reach level 140 and bring $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$.
Traditional_Chinese: 達到 140 級，並帶來 $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$。

English: Hero Grade (3)
Traditional_Chinese: 英雄等級 (3)

English: I need you to reach level 160 and bring $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$. Only a real Hero can do that!
Traditional_Chinese: 我需要你達到 160 級，並帶來 $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$。只有真正的英雄才能辦到！

English: Reach level 160 and bring $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$.
Traditional_Chinese: 達到 160 級，並帶來 $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$。

English: Rumble from the Depths
Traditional_Chinese: 深淵的震響

English: (H-Hiii…!) T-tremors... w-waves... taller than a Clockworks... (Gulp) A... a deafening noise... Wh-what’s going on?!
Traditional_Chinese: (嗚、嗚呀……！) 震動……浪……比時空毀滅者還高……(吞口水) 還有……震耳欲聾的聲音……這、這到底是怎麼回事！？

English: What?! You’re not aware??! But where have you been?! Honestly… We can never count on you to keep an eye on our precious world…
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？！你竟然不知道？！那你這段時間到底跑去哪了？！說真的……我們根本不能指望你照看我們珍貴的世界……

English: Well… listen. It doesn’t matter, I’ll need you. I have no idea what happened, or even where exactly… (hesitation) But I feel like the deafening noise came from the Krakens side.
Traditional_Chinese: 唉……聽著，這不重要，我需要你。我完全不知道發生了什麼，甚至不確定具體地點……(遲疑) 但我感覺那震耳欲聾的聲音是從克拉肯那一帶傳來的。

English: I would have gone myself, but you see… (looking away) I still have a lot to do, and there are other adventurers I need to take care of… (coughs) And don’t think I’m scared, okay! It has nothing to do with that, absolutely nothing!
Traditional_Chinese: 我本來是想自己去的，但你看……(移開視線) 我還有很多事情要處理，而且還有其他冒險者需要我照顧……(咳嗽) 你可別以為我是害怕，知道嗎！絕對不是，完全不是！

English: Find the location of the events and see what’s happening there
Traditional_Chinese: 找出事件發生的位置，看看那裡到底發生了什麼事。

English: Ah! Finally, someone reliable! I knew I could count on you. Go quickly, check near the Krakens side, and come back to tell me what you find. I’m sure you’ll do an excellent job! But… be careful, alright? That rumble wasn’t normal...
Traditional_Chinese: 啊！終於來了個可靠的人！我就知道可以指望你。快去吧，到克拉肯那一帶查看，然後回來告訴我你發現了什麼。我相信你一定會做得很好！不過……要小心，好嗎？那陣轟鳴聲很不尋常……

English: What?! You’re not going?! Really… We can’t count on anyone… Fine, do as you wish, but remember that this world needs protectors, not cowards. And don’t come complaining if things get worse without you!
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？！你不去？！真是的……誰都靠不住……好吧，隨你便。但記住，這個世界需要的是守護者，不是懦夫。到時候情況變得更糟，可別回來抱怨！

English: Starfish… coral… and all kinds of little sea things coming together to form… a portal?! This is insane… How could this be possible?!
Traditional_Chinese: 海星……珊瑚……還有各種海裡的小東西聚在一起，竟然形成了……傳送門？！太瘋狂了……這怎麼可能？！

English: You’re back already? But… don’t tell me you haven’t checked out the source of that noise yet! We need to know what’s happening on the Krakens side. Go on, get moving! The world’s not going to protect itself, you know!
Traditional_Chinese: 你這麼快就回來了？別告訴我你還沒去查看那個聲音的源頭！我們得知道克拉肯那邊到底發生了什麼。快去吧！世界可不會自己保護自己！

English: Magic water stone of Herneos
Traditional_Chinese: 海尼爾遺都的魔法水石

English: Hmm… If what you’re telling me is true, it would correspond to a well-known legend of Madrigal… Once upon a time, in the Old World, Herneos was a prosperous city where everyone dreamed of living, a true underwater paradise with magnificent architecture.
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯……如果你說的都是真的，那就和瑪德利賈的一則古老傳說相符了……從前，在舊世界中，海尼爾遺都是一座繁榮的城市，人人都夢想住在那裡，是一座擁有華美建築的真正海底樂園。

English: But one day, Shade pierced the glass bubble that protected Herneos from the depths of the ocean, and the city sank… along with its inhabitants. Since then, despite numerous searches, we have never found this lost city. But if you’re telling me a portal has opened…
Traditional_Chinese: 但有一天，夏德刺破了保護海尼爾遺都免受深海侵襲的玻璃氣泡，整座城市隨之沉沒……居民也一同消失。從那之後，儘管有無數次搜索，我們始終找不到這座失落之城。但如果你說傳送門已經打開……

English: I’m afraid Shade has finally found a way to return to the city of Herneos… For what purpose? I have no idea, but we need to ensure it is indeed the city of Herneos…
Traditional_Chinese: 我擔心夏德終於找到重返海尼爾遺都的方法了……至於她的目的，我完全不知道，但我們必須先確認那裡是否真的是海尼爾遺都……

English: Bring back a magical water stone from the discovered location and have it analyzed by Dr. Estly
Traditional_Chinese: 從發現的地點帶回一顆魔法水石，交給艾斯特利博士分析。

English: Ah, thank you! I knew you’d understand the urgency. If this really is a magical water stone from Herneos, then Shade’s reach might be spreading in ways we never expected… Please, bring back a stone as soon as you can. And be careful Herneos may be more dangerous now than we imagine.
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，謝謝你！我就知道你明白這件事有多緊急。如果這真的是來自海尼爾遺都的魔法水石，那麼夏德的勢力可能正以我們從未想像過的方式擴張……請盡快帶回一顆石頭。而且一定要小心，現在的海尼爾遺都可能比我們想像得更危險。

English: What?! You’re not interested in helping with this? You don’t understand this isn’t just some small errand! Herneos could be the key to untold mysteries… and maybe even threats. But fine, if you can’t be bothered, I’ll just have to find someone else…
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？！你對幫忙這件事沒興趣？你根本不明白，這可不是什麼小跑腿！海尼爾遺都可能藏著無數秘密……甚至還有威脅。算了，如果你不願意，我只能去找別人了……

English: Ah, you've returned with the magical water stone! Thank you! I'll begin the analysis right away to confirm its origin.
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，你帶回魔法水石了！謝謝你！我會立刻開始分析，確認它的來源。

English: Back so soon? You don’t have the magical water stone yet? We’re counting on that stone to prove if it’s truly from Herneos. Shade’s power might be stronger than we thought, so time is crucial. Please, return as soon as you have it!
Traditional_Chinese: 這麼快就回來了？你還沒拿到魔法水石嗎？我們就靠那顆石頭來證明它是否真的來自海尼爾遺都。夏德的力量可能比我們想的更強，所以時間很重要。請一拿到就立刻回來！

English: Under Shade's Command
Traditional_Chinese: 闇影的支配下

English: What?! Monsters? Whole hordes?! Listen… Shade must already be at work, and if she’s there, she won’t waste any time.
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？！怪物？整群的？！聽著……夏得肯定已經開始行動了，而如果她在那裡，她絕不會浪費任何時間。

English: I’ll need you to return there. Observe, fight, assess their strengths… If these creatures are really under Shade’s control, we need to know what awaits us.
Traditional_Chinese: 我需要你再回去一次。觀察、戰鬥、評估牠們的力量……如果這些生物真的受夏德操控，我們就必須知道前方有什麼在等著我們。

English: When you’ve dealt with the monsters, return to see Dr. Estly. He should have finished the analysis of the water by then, and we’ll finally know if this submerged city is indeed Herneos…
Traditional_Chinese: 處理完那些怪物後，回去找艾斯特利博士。到那時她應該已經完成水石分析，我們終於能知道這座沉沒的城市是否真的是海尼爾遺都……

English: Kill $QUEST_END_KILL_COUNT$ $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$s, $QUEST_END_KILL_COUNT,2$ $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME,2$s, $QUEST_END_KILL_COUNT,3$ $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME,3$s and return talk to Sovann.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 $QUEST_END_KILL_COUNT$ 隻 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$、$QUEST_END_KILL_COUNT,2$ 隻 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME,2$、以及 $QUEST_END_KILL_COUNT,3$ 隻 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME,3$，然後回去和索萬談話。

English: Excellent! I knew I could count on you. The creatures under Shade’s command won’t go down easily, but with your skills, I’m confident you can handle them. Go, and show them that we won’t back down! Once you've dealt with them, check back with Sovann.
Traditional_Chinese: 太好了！我就知道可以指望你。夏德麾下的生物可不會輕易倒下，但憑你的本事，我相信你一定應付得來。去吧，讓牠們知道我們不會退縮！處理完之後，再回去找索萬。

English: What?! You’re refusing?! Don’t you see how serious this is? Shade’s forces won’t stop they’ll only get stronger if we ignore them. Fine, if you’re not willing to help, I’ll find someone who is up to the challenge. But don’t forget you might regret standing by if Shade succeeds.
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？！你拒絕？！你難道看不出這件事有多嚴重嗎？夏德的勢力不會停下，只會因為我們忽視而變得更強。好吧，如果你不願幫忙，我就去找願意面對這項挑戰的人。但別忘了，若夏德得逞，你可能會後悔自己袖手旁觀。

English: You’re back again? But… have you not dealt with those monsters yet? We need to know what we’re up against! Shade’s forces are growing stronger every moment you delay. Go back and finish the job! Time is of the essence, and the fate of Herneos depends on it!
Traditional_Chinese: 你又回來了？怎麼，你還沒處理掉那些怪物嗎？我們必須知道自己正在面對什麼！你拖得越久，夏德的勢力就越強。快回去完成任務！時間緊迫，海尼爾遺都的命運就看這次了！

English: You did it! I knew you could handle those monsters! Thank you for stepping up when we needed it the most.
Traditional_Chinese: 你做到了！我就知道你能應付那些怪物！謝謝你在我們最需要的時候挺身而出。

English: Seeking the Truth of Herneos
Traditional_Chinese: 追尋海尼爾遺都的真相

English: I’m afraid I don’t have the knowledge necessary to interpret the results correctly.
Traditional_Chinese: 恐怕我沒有足夠的知識，無法正確解讀這些分析結果。

English: Listen, take this sample and bring it to Martinyc the historian of Flarine. Only she has the archives and the skills to compare and tell you what’s going on! If this water is really connected to Herneos, she’ll know.
Traditional_Chinese: 聽著，把這份樣本帶去給布拉里斯的歷史學家馬特尼提特。只有她有檔案和能力能拿來比對，告訴你這到底是怎麼回事！如果這些水真的和海尼爾遺都有關，她一定知道。

English: Take the analysis result to Martinyc the historian of Flarine
Traditional_Chinese: 把分析結果帶給布拉里斯的歷史學家馬特尼提特。

English: Thank you! I knew you’d understand the importance of this. Martinyc is our best hope for interpreting these results. Take the sample to her right away, and let’s hope she can shed some light on this mystery! The fate of Herneos could depend on it!
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你！我就知道你明白這件事的重要性。馬特尼提特是我們目前最有希望解讀這些結果的人。立刻把樣本交給她吧，希望她能為這個謎團帶來一些光明！海尼爾遺都的命運可能就取決於此！

English: What? You’re turning this down? This is vital information that could unlock the secrets of Herneos! If you won’t help now, I don’t know what we’ll do. Fine, but don’t forget that knowledge is power, and you might regret passing on this opportunity!
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？你要拒絕這件事？這可是能解開海尼爾遺都秘密的重要資訊！如果你現在不幫忙，我真不知道還能怎麼辦。好吧，但別忘了，知識就是力量，錯過這次機會你可能會後悔！

English: You’re back? But… have you not delivered the sample to Martinyc yet? We need her expertise to understand what the analysis reveals! Time is running out, and if this water is connected to Herneos, we need to act quickly. Go now, before it’s too late!
Traditional_Chinese: 你回來了？但……你還沒把樣本交給馬特尼提特嗎？我們需要她的專業來理解分析結果！時間不多了，如果這些水真的和海尼爾遺都有關，我們就得立刻行動。快去吧，別等到太遲！

English: Trophies from the Depths
Traditional_Chinese: 來自深淵的戰利品

English: Hello, who are you?... Oh, you must be the adventurer Estly told me about! Nice to meet you. How can I assist you?
Traditional_Chinese: 你好，你是誰？……喔，你一定就是艾斯特利提過的那位冒險者！很高興見到你。我能怎麼幫你呢？

English: Oh, you want me to interpret the results of this analysis to check, using the archives, if this water is indeed from the city of Herneos?
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，你是想請我利用檔案資料來解讀這份分析結果，好確認這些水是否真的來自海尼爾遺都？

English: (Smirking) But nothing comes for free, you know! I heard there are all-new monsters, never seen before, over there…
Traditional_Chinese: (露出笑意) 不過你知道的，天下可沒有白吃的午餐！我聽說那邊出現了從未見過的全新怪物……

English: While I compare the results, could you bring me samples or souvenirs from each creature? That would allow me to enrich our archives on these strange appearances.
Traditional_Chinese: 在我比對結果的期間，你能不能幫我帶回每種生物的樣本或紀念物？這樣我就能把這些奇異現象補進我們的檔案裡。

English: Bring back $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$, $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT,2$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME,2$, $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT,3$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME,3$
Traditional_Chinese: 把 $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$、$QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT,2$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME,2$、$QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT,3$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME,3$ 帶回來

English: Ah, wonderful! I knew you’d be up for the task. These new creatures are unlike anything we've documented, so any samples you bring will be invaluable. While you’re collecting them, I’ll start the comparison. Come back once you have the items, and we’ll see what these archives reveal about Herneos.
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，太好了！我就知道你願意接下這個任務。這些新生物和我們記錄過的任何東西都不同，所以你帶回的任何樣本都會非常珍貴。你去收集的同時，我會開始比對分析。等你帶著物品回來後，我們就能看看這些檔案究竟會揭露海尼爾遺都的什麼秘密。

English: Really? You’re refusing? (Sighs) I suppose not everyone appreciates the importance of history… But fine, go ahead just remember that these discoveries are rare. Who knows if you'll get another chance to contribute to our knowledge of Herneos.
Traditional_Chinese: 真的？你要拒絕？(嘆氣) 看來不是每個人都懂歷史的重要性……算了，隨你吧。但請記住，這類發現極其罕見。誰知道你還有沒有下一次機會，能為我們對海尼爾遺都的認識做出貢獻。

English: Ohhh, thank you for these souvenirs! I can finally… continue my collection... uh, enrich the city archives! (clears throat) Yes, of course, the archives!
Traditional_Chinese: 喔喔喔，謝謝你帶回這些紀念品！我終於可以……繼續我的收藏了……呃，是充實城市檔案館！咳咳，對，當然是檔案館！

English: Ah, you’re back? But… I don’t see any of the samples I asked for. These souvenirs from the creatures are essential to my research, you know! Please, gather them quickly and return. The archives await your findings!
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，你回來了？可是……我沒看到我請你帶回來的樣本。這些生物身上的紀念品對我的研究至關重要，知道嗎！拜託，趕快去收集後回來吧。檔案館正等著你的發現！

English: Unveiling Herneos
Traditional_Chinese: 揭開海尼爾遺都的面紗

English: Ah, yes, the analysis results… So, according to our archives, the water you retrieved matches 100% with that of the city of Herneos! It is indeed it You should quickly go announce this news to Sovann !
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，對，分析結果……根據我們的檔案，你帶回來的水樣與海尼爾遺都城的水完全吻合，百分之百就是它！你應該趕快去把這個消息告訴索萬！

English: Go tell Sovann it is indeed Herneos
Traditional_Chinese: 去告訴索萬，這裡的確就是海尼爾遺都

English: Fantastic! Thank you so much for delivering the news. Sovann will be thrilled or perhaps a bit anxious to hear it. Go quickly and let him know that Herneos has indeed resurfaced. We might be on the brink of something monumental!
Traditional_Chinese: 太棒了！非常感謝你傳遞這個消息。索萬聽到後一定會非常激動，或者也許有點不安。快去告訴他，海尼爾遺都確實已經重現了。我們也許正站在某件重大事件的開端！

English: Wait… you’re not going to tell him? This is crucial information! Herneos is real, and Sovann needs to know. Fine, if you won’t go, but don’t say I didn’t warn you… Discoveries like this don’t come every day, and neither does the chance to be part of history.
Traditional_Chinese: 等等……你不打算告訴他？這可是關鍵情報！海尼爾遺都真的存在，而且索萬必須知道。好吧，如果你不去，那就算了，但別說我沒提醒你……像這樣的發現可不是每天都有，更不是每天都有機會成為歷史的一部分。

English: What?? It’s really the lost city of Herneos?! (in awe) It’s incredible to see this iconic city again!
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼！？真的是失落之城海尼爾遺都！？(驚嘆) 真令人難以置信，竟然又能見到這座傳奇之城！

English: Oh, you’re back… but you still haven’t told Sovann? This is monumental news... Herneos has been confirmed! Please, don’t delay any longer. Sovann must hear this right away; the implications are too important to keep to ourselves!
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，你回來了……但你還沒告訴索萬嗎？這可是劃時代的大消息……海尼爾遺都已經被證實了！拜託，別再拖延了。索萬必須立刻知道，這件事的重要性不能被隱瞞！

English: Herneos: The Golden Legacy
Traditional_Chinese: 海尼爾遺都：黃金遺產

English: Listen, you should check if the treasure is still there! What treasure?! The treasure of Herneos, of course! You can’t miss it: gold, jewels, valuable items... a true legend!
Traditional_Chinese: 聽著，你應該去確認寶藏還在不在！什麼寶藏！？當然是海尼爾遺都的寶藏！你不能錯過：黃金、寶石、貴重物品……真正的傳奇寶藏！

English: So, what are you waiting for? Hurry before Shade gets her hands on it!
Traditional_Chinese: 那你還在等什麼？快點，別讓闇影搶先得手！

English: Check if the treasure is still there
Traditional_Chinese: 確認寶藏是否仍然存在

English: Yes! I knew you wouldn’t pass up a chance like this. The treasure of Herneos is the stuff of legends if it’s still there, it could be a discovery of a lifetime! Go quickly, and make sure you get there before Shade does. Good luck!
Traditional_Chinese: 很好！我就知道你不會錯過這種機會。海尼爾遺都的寶藏可是傳說中的寶物，如果它還在，那將會是畢生難得的重大發現！快去吧，而且一定要趕在闇影之前抵達。祝你好運！

English: You’re… refusing? Are you serious?! This is the legendary treasure of Herneos! Opportunities like this don’t come around twice, you know. Fine, but don’t say I didn’t give you the chance to be part of something unforgettable.
Traditional_Chinese: 你……拒絕？你是認真的嗎？！這可是海尼爾遺都的傳說寶藏！這種機會可不會有第二次。好吧，但別說我沒給你成為傳奇一部分的機會。

English: The treasure is still there?! Great news! But… it’s possible that all is not lost, if we act quickly. Very quickly.
Traditional_Chinese: 寶藏還在！？太好了！不過……如果我們行動夠快，也許還不算太遲。非常、非常快地行動。

English: Cutting Shade's Power
Traditional_Chinese: 削弱闇影的勢力

English: I know it’s a lot to ask, but… could you start by eliminating the two generals of Shade’s army that you spotted in Herneos? (determined look) That should slow down Shade’s advance and considerably weaken her right hand.
Traditional_Chinese: 我知道這要求很多，但是……你能不能先去解決你在海尼爾遺都發現的那兩名闇影軍團將軍？(神情堅定) 這應該能拖慢闇影的進軍，並大幅削弱她的右手。

English: Kill $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ & $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME,2$ the two generals of Shade at Herneos
Traditional_Chinese: 在海尼爾遺都擊殺闇影的兩名將軍：$QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ 與 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME,2$

English: Thank you! With Shade’s generals out of the way, we might actually stand a chance. I know it won’t be easy, but you’re the only one who can do it. Go now, and show them that we won’t let Herneos fall under Shade’s control!
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你！只要除掉闇影的將軍，我們或許真的還有一線希望。我知道這不容易，但只有你辦得到。快去吧，讓他們知道我們不會讓海尼爾遺都落入闇影的掌控！

English: What?! You’re backing out now? This is no time for hesitation! Shade’s forces are closing in, and without your help, we may not be able to hold them back. But fine, if you won’t act, we’ll have to hope someone else is up for the challenge…
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？！你現在要退縮？現在可不是猶豫的時候！闇影 的部隊正在逼近，沒有你的幫助，我們也許撐不住。好吧，如果你不願行動，那我們只能寄望別人願意挺身而出了……

English: What?! You did it already?! (beaming smile) I can’t believe it! It’s incredible to count on you. You’re our true savior!
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？！你已經完成了！？(笑容燦爛) 我真不敢相信！有你在真是太可靠了。你真的是我們的救世主！

English: You’re back... but the two generals of Shade are still standing? Every moment they’re left unchecked, Herneos is at greater risk. We’re counting on you to stop them. There’s no time to lose!
Traditional_Chinese: 你回來了……但闇影的兩名將軍還活著？每多拖一刻，海尼爾遺都的風險就更高。我們全靠你阻止他們了，已經沒有時間能浪費！

English: The Final Battle for Herneos
Traditional_Chinese: 海尼爾遺都的最終決戰

English: Now that you’ve weakened the boss by taking out the two generals of Shade’s army, it would be wise for you to face her right hand before he regains his full power.
Traditional_Chinese: 既然你已經透過擊敗闇影軍團的兩位將軍削弱了首領，那麼在她的右手恢復全盛力量之前，現在正是你去面對他的最佳時機。

English: Me, go with you?!? (nervous laugh) Oh no, no… they always say not to change a winning team, and our way of teaming up is simply perfect, don’t you think?
Traditional_Chinese: 我？跟你一起去？！(緊張地笑) 喔不不不……人家不是都說不要隨便更動勝利組合嗎？我們現在這種合作方式不是就很完美嗎？

English: And if you succeed, don’t forget to stop by the mayor of Flarine, he will surely reward you generously for this achievement!
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你成功了，別忘了去找布拉里斯鎮的市長，他一定會為了這項壯舉慷慨地獎勵你！

English: Kill $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$ and return back to me.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$，然後回來找我。

English: Amazing! I knew I could count on you to see this through. Facing Shade’s right hand won’t be easy, but if anyone can do it, it’s you. Just remember if you succeed, don’t forget to see the mayor in Flarine. I’m sure he’ll have a worthy reward for you. Good luck, hero!
Traditional_Chinese: 太棒了！我就知道你一定能一路撐到這裡。對付闇影的右手絕非易事，但如果有人辦得到，那一定是你。只要記住，成功之後別忘了去見布拉里斯鎮的市長，我相信他一定會給你一份配得上這份功績的獎勵。祝你好運，英雄！

English: What?! You’re refusing? After all we’ve done to get this far? This is the final step! If you don’t finish this, Shade’s influence will only grow stronger. But… if you won’t go, we’ll just have to hope someone else has the courage. I only hope it’s not too late.
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？！你要拒絕？我們都走到這裡了，這可是最後一步！如果你不把這件事做完，闇影的勢力只會更加壯大。但……如果你不去，我們也只能希望還有人有勇氣挺身而出。我只希望一切還來得及。

English: Back already? But Shade’s right hand is still out there, gathering strength! This is our final chance to stop her influence from spreading through Herneos. Please finish what you started. All of Madrigal is depending on you!
Traditional_Chinese: 這麼快就回來了？可是闇影的右手還在外頭集結力量！這是我們最後一次阻止她的勢力擴散到海尼爾遺都的機會。拜託，完成你開始的事吧。整個瑪德利賈都在等著你！

English: You did it! You've defeated Shade’s right hand! This is a monumental victory for Madrigal that will be remembered for ages. You’ve truly saved Herneos and brought hope back to our people.
Traditional_Chinese: 你做到了！你擊敗了闇影的右手！這是瑪德利賈足以流傳千古的重大勝利。你真的拯救了海尼爾遺都，也為我們的人民帶回了希望。

English: Gratitude of the Mayor
Traditional_Chinese: 市長的謝意

English: (Incredulous look) You did it… You really defeated Shade’s right hand?! (sigh of relief) I can’t believe it, this is incredible!
Traditional_Chinese: (難以置信的神情) 你做到了……你真的擊敗了闇影的右手？！(鬆了一口氣) 我簡直不敢相信，這實在太驚人了！

English: Thanks to you, we finally have real hope to repel the darkness threatening Madrigal. You accomplished the impossible, where so many others would have failed.
Traditional_Chinese: 多虧了你，我們終於真正看見了擊退威脅瑪德利賈黑暗勢力的希望。你完成了不可能的任務，那是許多人都做不到的事。

English: Take this… It’s a well-deserved reward. As the Mayor of Flaris, I thank you from the bottom of my heart for your courage and bravery!
Traditional_Chinese: 收下這個吧……這是你應得的獎勵。身為布拉里斯的市長，我由衷感謝你的勇氣與英勇！

English: I don’t know what Shade is planning next, but with you by our side, I’m sure we can face any danger. Thank you… really, thank you from the bottom of my heart, hero.
Traditional_Chinese: 我不知道闇影接下來還有什麼打算，但只要有你在身邊，我相信我們能面對任何危險。謝謝你……真的，打從心底謝謝你，英雄。

English: Rumor has it that the mayor of Flarine is eager to personally reward you for your recent achievement! You should definitely pay him a visit
Traditional_Chinese: 聽說布拉里斯鎮的市長非常想親自獎勵你最近的功績！你真的應該去拜訪他一下。

English: Herneos: Ruins of Glory
Traditional_Chinese: 海尼爾遺都：榮耀的廢墟

English: It may take a little time, though, so while I work, you might want to head back and speak with Captain Sovann. I’m sure he’ll have more for you to do in the meantime.
Traditional_Chinese: 這可能還需要一點時間，所以趁我還在處理時，你可以先回去找索萬船長談談。我相信他現在一定還有其他事想請你幫忙。

English: Ah, you’re back! Did you manage to deliver the magical water stone to Dr. Estly? And what did you find along the way? Any signs of Shade’s forces?
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，你回來了！你有把魔法水石送去給艾斯特利博士嗎？沿途又發現了什麼？有沒有夏德勢力的蹤跡？

English: Thank you for reporting back to me. If Shade is behind these creatures, we need to assess the situation carefully. Go now and prepare yourself I fear this may only be the beginning.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你回來向我報告。如果這些生物真的是夏德派來的，我們就得更謹慎地評估局勢。去吧，先做好準備——我擔心這可能只是個開始。

English: Go back to Sovann and report that you have delivered the magical water stone to Dr. Estly and encountered Shade's forces along the way.
Traditional_Chinese: 回去找索萬，向他報告你已將魔法水石送交艾斯特利博士，並在途中遭遇了夏德的勢力。

English: Reporting Back to Sovann
Traditional_Chinese: 回報索萬

English: You didn’t deliver the message yet? We need to be fully aware of what’s happening in Herneos. Hurry back and let Sovann know what you encountered.
Traditional_Chinese: 你還沒把消息帶回去嗎？我們必須完全掌握海尼爾遺都目前發生的事。快回去，把你遇到的情況告訴索萬。

English: Very well! You’re truly dedicated to uncovering the mysteries of Herneos. Report back to Sovann with the details it’s crucial he knows about Shade’s forces. Thank you for stepping up; your bravery will be invaluable in this journey!
Traditional_Chinese: 很好！你確實全心投入在揭開海尼爾遺都的謎團。快把詳細情況回報給索萬，讓他知道夏德勢力的動向至關重要。謝謝你挺身而出；你的勇氣在這趟旅程中將無比珍貴！

English: What?! You’re turning back now? Reporting this information to Sovann is essential if we’re to understand Shade’s reach! But fine, if you’re not willing… Just remember, this discovery could change everything. Don’t let this chance slip by.
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？！你現在要打退堂鼓？如果我們想搞清楚夏德的勢力範圍，就必須把這些資訊回報給索萬！好吧，如果你不願意……但記住，這項發現可能改變一切。別讓這次機會白白溜走。

English: Return to Dr. Estly
Traditional_Chinese: 回去找艾斯特利博士

English: Now, go see Dr. Estly; he should have finished the analysis of the water by now. We’re one step closer to uncovering the truth about Herneos!
Traditional_Chinese: 現在去見艾斯特利博士吧；她現在應該已經完成水的分析了。我們離揭開海尼爾遺都的真相又更近一步！

English: Excellent! The analysis should reveal invaluable information about Herneos. Head to Dr. Estly right away, and let’s finally uncover the secrets that lie within this legendary city!
Traditional_Chinese: 太好了！這份分析應該能揭露對海尼爾遺都極其珍貴的資訊。立刻前往艾斯特利博士那裡吧，讓我們終於揭開這座傳說之城深藏的秘密！

English: Really? You’re choosing not to follow up on this? Dr. Estly’s analysis could be the key to understanding Herneos and possibly even stopping Shade. But if you won’t go, we’ll have to hope someone else steps up to the task.
Traditional_Chinese: 真的？你選擇不繼續追查下去？艾斯特利博士的分析可能是理解海尼爾遺都，甚至阻止夏德的關鍵。如果你不去，我們也只能寄望其他人願意挺身而出了。

English: You haven’t visited Dr. Estly yet? The analysis of the water might hold crucial answers about Herneos! Time is ticking, and we need that information to understand what Shade might be planning. Please, head to him as soon as possible.
Traditional_Chinese: 你還沒去找艾斯特利博士嗎？水的分析結果可能藏著解開海尼爾遺都的關鍵答案！時間正在流逝，而我們需要那份資訊來理解夏德可能在策劃什麼。拜託你，盡快去找她吧。

English: The analysis is complete, but... (annoyed look)
Traditional_Chinese: 分析已經完成了，但是……(露出不悅的表情)

English: It’s time to return to Dr. Estly. The analysis should be complete by now, and with it, we might finally learn the truth about Herneos. Head back to her as soon as you can!
Traditional_Chinese: 是時候回去找艾斯特利博士了。分析現在應該已經完成，有了它，我們或許終於能知道海尼爾遺都的真相。儘快回去找她吧！

English: A rumor says a great reward awaits you... Go speak to the mayor of Flarine!
Traditional_Chinese: 聽說有一份豐厚獎勵正等著你……快去找布拉里斯的村長談談吧！

English: That's awesome! Hurry and go see the mayor!
Traditional_Chinese: 太棒了！快去見村長吧！

English: What do you mean, no?! You've already done everything.. You just need to claim your reward from the mayor of Flarine!
Traditional_Chinese: 你說什麼，不要？！你都已經做完這一切了……現在只差去找布拉里斯的村長領取獎勵而已！

English: Do you think you could bring me a magical water stone from there? With an analysis of the stone, we can confirm if it truly originates from Herneos, as magical water stones can only be found in that legendary city.
Traditional_Chinese: 你能從那裡幫我帶一顆魔法水石回來嗎？只要分析這顆石頭，我們就能確認它是否真的來自海尼爾遺都，因為魔法水石只會出現在那座傳說之城。

English: Christmas Invasion 1
Traditional_Chinese: 聖誕入侵 1

English: Christmas Invasion 2
Traditional_Chinese: 聖誕入侵 2

English: Christmas Invasion 3
Traditional_Chinese: 聖誕入侵 3

English: Year of the Snake 2025
A Taste of Inspiration
Traditional_Chinese: 靈感的滋味

English: Oh, hello there, young adventurer! What a pleasure to meet you! Say, could you do me a favor?
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，你好啊，年輕的冒險者！很高興見到你！那個……你可以幫我一個忙嗎？

English: There's a novelist in our lovely town whose work I deeply admire, but it seems he's feeling a bit down lately, which is delaying his next masterpiece.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們鎮上有位小說家，他的作品我非常喜歡，但他最近似乎有些消沉，導致下一部傑作遲遲無法完成。

English: Would you be so kind as to deliver this to him on my behalf? I believe it might lift his spirits!
Traditional_Chinese: 你願意替我把這個送給他嗎？我想這或許能讓他重新振作！

English: Oh, wonderful! I knew I could count on you! This small gesture might be just what he needs to find inspiration again. Please, deliver it to him as soon as you can, and let me know how he reacts! Thank you, brave adventurer!
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，太好了！我就知道可以指望你！這份小小的心意也許正是他重新找回靈感所需要的。請盡快幫我送去給他，然後告訴我他的反應！謝謝你，勇敢的冒險者！

English: Oh… I see. That’s unfortunate. I was really hoping you could help… but I understand. If you ever change your mind, please let me know. His words have brought joy to so many, and it pains me to see him struggling.
Traditional_Chinese: 喔……我懂了。真可惜。我原本真的很希望你能幫忙……但我能理解。如果你改變主意，請一定告訴我。他的文字帶給許多人歡樂，看到他現在這麼苦惱，我真的很難受。

English: Huh? What’s this...?" (opens the package, raises an eyebrow, then bursts into laughter)
Traditional_Chinese: 咦？這是什麼……？」(打開包裹，挑起眉毛，接著大笑起來)

English: Two pizzas and… milk? Haha! She really knows me too well! Just the sight of this is enough to bring back my motivation! There’s nothing like a good meal to get the creative juices flowing!
Traditional_Chinese: 兩個披薩還有……牛奶？哈哈！她真的太了解我了！光是看到這些，就足以讓我的創作動力全都回來！沒有什麼比一頓好吃的更能讓靈感湧現了！

English: (takes a more serious but grateful tone)
Traditional_Chinese: (語氣變得更認真，但仍充滿感激。)

English: Thank you, adventurer. I was feeling stuck, but this… this reminds me that sometimes, the simplest joys are the best remedy. I owe you one! Now, time to get back to writing!
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你，冒險者。我剛才還陷在瓶頸裡，但這些……讓我想起，有時最簡單的快樂就是最好的解藥。我欠你一份人情！現在，該回去寫作了！

English: Oh, adventurer! You haven’t delivered the gift yet? The poor novelist must still be struggling with his writer’s block... Please, don’t keep him waiting too long! A little kindness can go a long way, and I know this will cheer him up!
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，冒險者！你還沒把禮物送出去嗎？那位可憐的小說家現在一定還困在寫作瓶頸裡……請別讓他等太久！一點小小的善意就能帶來巨大改變，我知道這一定能讓他開心起來！

English: Deliver a special gift to the novelist to lift his spirits and help him continue writing.
Traditional_Chinese: 把特別的禮物送給小說家，讓他振作起來並繼續寫作。

English: The Call of the Lawolf
Traditional_Chinese: 洛沃夫的呼喚

English: You know, adventurer, now that my spirits are lifted, I can finally get back to writing!
Traditional_Chinese: 你知道嗎，冒險者，現在我心情好多了，終於能重新回到寫作上！

English: But there’s one problem… I need inspiration for my next chapter, and I want to write about Lawolfs.
Traditional_Chinese: 但有個問題……我下一章需要靈感，而我想寫的是洛沃夫。

English: The problem is, I don’t know enough about them! Would you be willing to gather some information on these creatures for me?
Traditional_Chinese: 問題是，我對牠們知道得不夠多！你願意替我蒐集一些關於這些生物的資訊嗎？

English: Ah, fantastic! I knew I could count on you! Lawolfs are fascinating creatures, but I need accurate details to make my story truly come to life.
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，太棒了！我就知道可以靠你！洛沃夫是很有魅力的生物，但我需要正確的細節，才能讓我的故事真正鮮活起來。

English: Go observe them, take notes, and bring me everything you learn! I can't wait to hear what you find!
Traditional_Chinese: 去觀察牠們、做筆記，然後把你知道的一切都帶回來給我！我等不及想聽聽你的發現了！

English: Oh… I see. That’s disappointing, but I suppose I’ll have to manage without it. I just hope my story won’t end up being full of mistakes… If you change your mind, let me know!
Traditional_Chinese: 喔……我懂了。雖然很失望，但看來我只能自己想辦法了。只希望我的故事最後不會寫得滿是錯誤……如果你改變主意，記得告訴我！

English: Ah, you’re back! Let’s see what you’ve got… Hmm… Interesting! So that’s how they behave? And their fur… I never would have imagined! This is exactly what I needed!
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，你回來了！讓我看看你帶回了什麼……嗯……有意思！原來牠們是這樣行動的？還有那身毛皮……我完全想像不到！這正是我需要的！

English: Thank you, adventurer, you’ve been an invaluable help. Now, it’s time to turn these notes into an unforgettable story!
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你，冒險者，你真的幫了我大忙。現在，是時候把這些筆記寫成一篇令人難忘的故事了！

English: Still no news on the Lawolfs? I don’t mean to rush you, but I’m eager to continue my novel! The more I wait, the more my ideas fade… Please, if you have time, I’d really appreciate your help!
Traditional_Chinese: 還沒有洛沃夫的消息嗎？我不是想催你，但我真的很想繼續我的小說！拖得越久，我腦中的靈感就越模糊……如果你有空，我會非常感激你的幫助！

English: Defeat 5 Young Lawolfs and bring back your findings to the novelist.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗 5 隻年幼洛沃夫，並將調查結果帶回給小說家。

English: Scars of the Battlefield
Traditional_Chinese: 戰場的傷痕

English: Adventurer! I just had a stroke of genius! My story is missing something… something raw, something real! A true relic of battle, a War Scar! I know it’s risky, but imagine the credibility it would add to my novel!
Traditional_Chinese: 冒險者！我剛剛靈光一閃！我的故事還缺少某種東西……某種粗獷、真實的感覺！一件真正的戰場遺物——戰痕！我知道這很危險，但你想想看，它能為我的小說增添多少真實感！

English: If you could bring me a piece of one, my story would be legendary! What do you say?
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你能替我帶回一塊，我的故事一定會成為傳奇！你覺得如何？

English: You will? Incredible! I knew you had the heart of a true adventurer! Be careful, though, War Scars are not easily found, and I fear the journey won’t be safe. But if anyone can do it, it’s you! Good luck, and may fate be on your side!
Traditional_Chinese: 你願意？太不可思議了！我就知道你有真正冒險者的膽識！不過要小心，戰痕可不是那麼容易找到的，我擔心這趟旅程不會太安全。但如果有人做得到，那一定是你！祝你好運，願命運站在你這邊！

English: Oh… I see. I can’t blame you; this is not an easy task. But what a shame… my story will lack that raw authenticity. If you ever change your mind, please let me know. Some risks are worth taking for the sake of greatness!
Traditional_Chinese: 喔……我懂了。我不能怪你，這確實不是件容易的事。但真可惜……我的故事將失去那份原始而真實的質感。如果你改變主意，請一定告訴我。有些風險，值得為了偉大而承擔！

English: You did it! You actually did it! Let me see… This… This is incredible! The texture, the scars of battle engraved upon it… This is exactly what I needed! You have no idea what this means for my novel! Thank you, adventurer, this will be the heart of my greatest story yet!
Traditional_Chinese: 你做到了！你真的做到了！讓我看看……這……這太不可思議了！這質地、刻印其上的戰鬥痕跡……這正是我所需要的！你根本不知道這對我的小說有多重要！謝謝你，冒險者，這將成為我至今最偉大故事的核心！

English: Still no sign of a War Scar? I know it’s dangerous, but I can’t get this idea out of my head! Without it, my novel will feel… incomplete. If you find the courage, please, I’d be forever grateful!
Traditional_Chinese: 還是沒有戰痕的蹤跡嗎？我知道這很危險，但這個念頭一直在我腦中揮之不去！少了它，我的小說就像……不完整一樣。如果你鼓起勇氣去做，我一定會永遠感激你！

English: Retrieve a War Scar to add authenticity to the novelist’s story.
Traditional_Chinese: 取得一塊戰痕，替小說家的故事增添真實感。

English: The Writer’s Legacy
Traditional_Chinese: 作家的遺產

English: Adventurer, your help has been invaluable! Thanks to you, my novel is shaping up to be something truly extraordinary. But before I finish, I need one last piece of inspiration… something legendary.
Traditional_Chinese: 冒險者，你的幫助實在太重要了！多虧有你，我的小說正逐漸成形，成為真正非凡的作品。不過在完成之前，我還需要最後一塊靈感拼圖……某種傳奇之物。

English: At the Fountain of the Departed, there is said to be a copy of the Book of Techniques, an ancient manuscript filled with lost knowledge. If you could retrieve an example of it for me, I promise to help you take the next step in your own journey. What do you say?
Traditional_Chinese: 據說在亡者之泉裡，有一本《技藝之書》的抄本，那是一本充滿失落知識的古老手稿。如果你能替我帶回一份樣本，我保證會幫你邁出你自己旅程中的下一步。你意下如何？

English: You will? That’s incredible! This book holds secrets that could bring my story to life like never before! But be careful, such knowledge does not rest unguarded. I have no doubt you’ll succeed, though. Return to me as soon as you find it!
Traditional_Chinese: 你願意？太棒了！這本書蘊藏的秘密，能讓我的故事比以往更加鮮活！不過要小心，這樣的知識不可能無人守護。但我相信你一定能成功。找到後就立刻回來找我吧！

English: Oh… I see. I won’t lie, I had high hopes. This book could be the key to my masterpiece… But I understand. If you change your mind, the offer still stands. And remember, I could help you in ways no ordinary teacher could.
Traditional_Chinese: 喔……我懂了。老實說，我本來寄予厚望。這本書可能是我傑作的關鍵……但我能理解。如果你改變主意，提議依然有效。記住，我能幫你的，絕不是普通導師做得到的。

English: You found it? Let me see… This is… astonishing! The pages, the ink, the wisdom held within… It’s more than I ever imagined! With this, my novel will be remembered for generations! And as promised, I will help you take your next step. You’ve done so much for me it’s only fair that I return the favor!
Traditional_Chinese: 你找到了？讓我看看……這真是……驚人！這些頁面、墨跡、蘊含其中的智慧……遠超出我的想像！有了它，我的小說必將流傳後世！而正如我承諾的，我會幫你邁出下一步。你為我做了這麼多，現在輪到我回報你了！

English: Still no sign of the Book of Techniques? I understand, it must be difficult to retrieve. But I assure you, this is no ordinary task. If you succeed, both of our fates could change forever. I believe in you, adventurer!
Traditional_Chinese: 還沒找到《技藝之書》嗎？我明白，拿到它一定不容易。但我向你保證，這絕不是普通任務。若你成功，我們兩人的命運都可能因此改變。我相信你，冒險者！

English: Find a copy of the Book of Techniques at the Fountain of the Departed for the novelist’s final chapter.
Traditional_Chinese: 替小說家在亡者之泉找來《技藝之書》的抄本，作為他最終章節的靈感。

English: Wisdom’s Legacy
Traditional_Chinese: 智慧的遺產

English: Adventurer, I can’t thank you enough! This book… it was exactly what I needed. I’ve taken all the notes I require, but such a treasure should not be wasted. There’s someone who would truly appreciate it, our town’s historian.
Traditional_Chinese: 冒險者，我真的不知該怎麼感謝你！這本書……正是我所需要的。我已經把需要的筆記都記下來了，但這樣的寶物不該被浪費。有一個人一定會真正珍惜它——我們鎮上的歷史學家。

English: She has dedicated her life to preserving knowledge, and this book deserves a place in her archives. If you deliver it to her, I’m sure she’ll reward you well enough to take your next step… your first specialization. What do you say?
Traditional_Chinese: 她一生都奉獻在保存知識上，這本書理應進入她的檔案庫。如果你把它交給她，我相信她一定會給你足夠的報酬，讓你邁出旅程中的下一步……你的第一次轉職。你覺得如何？

English: Thank you! I knew you would understand the importance of preserving knowledge. The historian will be thrilled to receive such a rare manuscript. Go, adventurer, and take this final step toward your destiny!
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你！我就知道你明白保存知識的重要性。歷史學家一定會很高興收到這樣罕見的手稿。去吧，冒險者，踏出通往你命運的最後一步！

English: Oh… I see. That’s unfortunate. This book holds so much wisdom, it would be a shame to let it go to waste. If you ever change your mind, please reconsider. This could be the final key to unlocking your future.
Traditional_Chinese: 喔……我懂了。真可惜。這本書蘊含太多智慧，若就這樣被浪費實在太可惜了。如果你改變主意，請再重新考慮。這可能是解鎖你未來的最後一把鑰匙。

English: (She carefully flips through the pages, completely fascinated.)
Traditional_Chinese: (她小心翼翼地翻閱頁面，看得入迷不已。)

English: I will make a faithful copy to ensure this wisdom is never lost. You have done a great service to history today." She closes the book and looks at you with a grateful smile. "And of course, I won’t let your efforts go unrewarded.
Traditional_Chinese: 我會忠實地製作一份抄本，確保這份智慧永遠不會失傳。今天你為歷史立下了大功。」她合上書本，感激地對你微笑。「而且當然，我也不會讓你的努力白費。」

English: Take this, consider it a token of my gratitude. With it, you should have everything you need to take the next step in your journey. May your path be filled with knowledge and greatness!
Traditional_Chinese: 把這個收下，就當作我感謝你的證明。有了它，你應該就具備踏上下一段旅程所需的一切。願你的道路充滿知識與偉大！

English: The book is still with you? Hmm… I don’t mean to rush, but knowledge like this should not be kept hidden for too long. The historian is waiting, and so is your destiny. When you're ready, make sure it reaches the right hands.
Traditional_Chinese: 書還在你那裡嗎？嗯……我不是想催你，但這樣的知識不該被埋沒太久。歷史學家正在等著，而你的命運也是。等你準備好時，記得把它交到該交的人手中。

English: Deliver the Book of Techniques to the historian so its knowledge can be preserved, and claim your reward.
Traditional_Chinese: 把《技藝之書》交給歷史學家保存其知識，並領取你的獎勵。

English: Spring Point Collection 1
Traditional_Chinese: 春季點數蒐集 1

English: Spring Point Collection 2
Traditional_Chinese: 春季點數蒐集 2

English: Spring Point Collection 3
Traditional_Chinese: 春季點數蒐集 3

English: Spring Point Collection 4
Traditional_Chinese: 春季點數蒐集 4

English: Help launch of an expedition
Traditional_Chinese: 協助遠征隊啟程

English: Have you heard? An expedition is being organized to discover a new continent!\n[Historian] Martinyc has found the coordinates of a possible new continent, and we are setting out to explore it.\nCan you help us in gathering supplies?
Traditional_Chinese: 你聽說了嗎？一支遠征隊正準備出發去發現新大陸！\n[歷史學家] 馬特尼提特找到了疑似新大陸的座標，而我們正要啟程前往探索。\n你能幫我們收集補給嗎？

English: How fortunate we are to have an adventurer like you! Actually... The monsters stole everything. We'll find the supplies when we've beaten them all!
Traditional_Chinese: 真幸運，我們有你這樣的冒險者！其實……怪物把東西全偷走了。只要把那些怪物全都打倒，我們就能把補給找回來！

English: Too bad... Come back when you can.
Traditional_Chinese: 太可惜了……等你有空再回來吧。

English: Thanks to you, the expedition will set off without a hitch! Thank you!
Traditional_Chinese: 多虧有你，遠征隊終於能順利出發了！謝謝你！

English: Uh... Are we there yet? No, no, no... I didn't mean to push you, but... I'd appreciate it if you could find them soon!
Traditional_Chinese: 呃……還沒好嗎？不、不、不……我不是想催你，但是……如果你能快點找回來，我會非常感激！

English: Hunt monsters (within 10Lv range from your level) to earn [Event] Supplies
Traditional_Chinese: 狩獵怪物 (等級與你相差 10 級以內) 以獲得 [活動] 補給品。

English: Looks like you're a new comer. Did you pick up the items one-by-one? I'll give you a newcomer's pet for you.
Traditional_Chinese: 看來你是新來的。你是一個一個慢慢撿道具的嗎？我送你一隻新手寵物吧。

English: Find Easter Eggs
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找復活節彩蛋

English: What is Lifestyle?
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼是生活技能？

English: Welcome. There are times when you want to achieve different type of strengths. Do you wish to try something new that’s not related to hunting monsters?
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎。有時候你會想獲得不同種類的力量。你想試試看一些和打怪無關的新東西嗎？

English: Good choice. I have something to give you so speak to me again.
Traditional_Chinese: 選得好。我有東西要給你，再和我談一次吧。

English: Currently I have 8 techniques to teach you. If you follow my lead you’ll soon learn them. This will help you when you try them out.
Traditional_Chinese: 目前我有 8 種技巧可以教你。只要照著我的指引，你很快就能學會。這會幫助你實際嘗試時更加順利。

English: Come back when you change your mind.
Traditional_Chinese: 等你改變主意再回來吧。

English: Android Box Event 1
Traditional_Chinese: Android Box 活動 1

English: Android Box Event 2
Traditional_Chinese: Android Box 活動 2

English: Complete the mission.
Traditional_Chinese: 完成任務。

English: Complete the mission.
Traditional_Chinese: 完成任務。

English: 3rd Anniversary Lucky Roulette!!
Traditional_Chinese: 3 週年幸運輪盤！！

English: 3rd Anniversary Egg Upgrade 1
Traditional_Chinese: 3 週年蛋升級 1

English: Happy to be with you for 3 years!\nKeep up the good work, this is my gift!
Traditional_Chinese: 很高興與你相伴 3 週年！\n繼續加油，這是我送你的禮物！

English: Nurture it with care!
Traditional_Chinese: 要好好照顧它喔！

English: 3rd Anniversary Egg Upgrade 2
Traditional_Chinese: 3 週年蛋升級 2

English: Whole New Substance
Traditional_Chinese: 全新物質

English: Thanks to your efforts, the expedition was launched without a hitch—and now they've sent word back that they've discovered a new substance. So, I ask you—would you be willing to lend your strength to further this research?
Traditional_Chinese: 多虧你的努力，遠征順利展開了——而且現在他們傳回消息，說發現了一種新物質。所以我想問你——你願意再借出力量，協助進一步研究嗎？

English: A shipment of experimental materials was en route here, but the escort grew careless—and monsters struck once again. You'll likely find them as you drive those beasts back where they came from.
Traditional_Chinese: 一批實驗材料原本正運送到這裡，但護送隊太過大意——怪物又一次襲擊了他們。只要你把那些野獸趕回老家，應該就能找到那些材料。

English: Too bad... Come back when you can.
Traditional_Chinese: 太可惜了……等你有空再回來吧。

English: With this, we can proceed with the experiments without delay. You have my deepest thanks. This may very well allow us to craft equipment superior to what you currently wear. Rest assured, I’ll make you the first to benefit from it.
Traditional_Chinese: 有了這些，我們就能毫不耽擱地繼續實驗。非常感謝你。這很可能能讓我們打造出比你現在身上裝備還更優秀的裝備。放心吧，我一定會讓你成為第一個受惠的人。

English: Hm... still gathering? No rush, of course—but I must admit, I expected someone like you to have completed it by now!
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯……還在收集嗎？當然，不急啦——不過我得承認，像你這樣的人，我本來以為早就完成了！

English: Hunt monsters (Lv. -10) to earn 3 Experiment Material Boxes
Traditional_Chinese: 狩獵怪物 (Lv. -10) 以取得 3 個實驗材料箱。

English: Revolutionary’s Secret Journal
Traditional_Chinese: 革命者的秘密日誌

English: Ugh... C-can you do me a favor...?
Traditional_Chinese: 呃……你、你可以幫我一個忙嗎……？

English: Thank you... I’ll stay hidden and recover. I’m counting on you.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你……我會先躲起來休養。我就拜託你了。

English: Ugh... I see... If you're busy, I understand...
Traditional_Chinese: 唔……我明白……如果你很忙，我可以理解……

English: Be careful. Many are after the Secret Journal.
Traditional_Chinese: 小心點。很多人都在找那本秘密日記。

English: Uncover the secrets within the Revolutionary Journal, and great rewards await you.
Traditional_Chinese: 揭開革命者日記中的秘密，豐厚獎勵正在等著你。

English: Monster Hunt!
Traditional_Chinese: 怪物狩獵！

English: Looking to get stronger, are you?
Traditional_Chinese: 想變得更強，是嗎？

English: Do me a favor and clear out the monsters nearby while you’re at it. I’ll see what I can do for you—just give it your all.
Traditional_Chinese: 順手幫我清理一下附近的怪物吧。我會看看能為你做些什麼——總之就盡全力吧。

English: Still not finished? Don’t keep me waiting past today.
Traditional_Chinese: 還沒完成嗎？別讓我今天一直等下去。

English: A time will come when you’ll need real strength. Come back to me if you’re desperate enough. Time’s not exactly on your side.
Traditional_Chinese: 總有一天你會需要真正的力量。等你真的走投無路時，再回來找我吧。時間可不站在你這邊。

English: Make good use of what you gain.
Traditional_Chinese: 好好利用你得到的東西。

English: Gather materials for Smiths!
Traditional_Chinese: 替鐵匠收集材料！

English: I’ll let you in on a little secret… Soon, stronger weapons and armor will be unveiled. The blacksmiths are still getting the hang of the new techniques, so the release has been delayed. But if you could gather the materials they need for practice, I reckon it might speed things up. What do you say—care to lend a hand?
Traditional_Chinese: 我告訴你一個小祕密……很快就會有更強的武器和防具問世。鐵匠們還在摸索新技術，所以發布被延後了。但如果你願意幫忙收集他們用來練習的材料，我想這應該能加快進度。怎麼樣——願意幫一把嗎？

English: Take a look at the reward I’ve prepared. Once you see it, you’ll realize it’s well worth your effort! The materials can be found from nearby monsters, so I’ll be counting on you.
Traditional_Chinese: 先看看我替你準備的獎勵吧。只要你看了，就會知道這絕對值得你付出努力！材料可以從附近的怪物身上取得，我就指望你了。

English: Ah… turning down such a fine opportunity, are you? A real shame—I thought you’d jump at the chance.
Traditional_Chinese: 啊……你要放棄這麼好的機會嗎？真是可惜——我本來還以為你會立刻答應呢。

English: Already gathered everything? …Oh, not yet? Very well—come back once you have them all.
Traditional_Chinese: 已經都收集好了嗎？……喔，還沒有？那好吧，等你全部集齊再回來。

English: Splendid! This should be more than enough for the blacksmiths to continue their research. You’ve done well.
Traditional_Chinese: 太好了！這些應該足夠讓鐵匠們繼續研究了。你做得很好。

English: 3rd Job Change
Traditional_Chinese: 三轉職業變更

English: Chapter 1 Expedition
Traditional_Chinese: 第 1 章 遠征

English: A Hand of Compassion
Traditional_Chinese: 憐憫之手

English: I have a funny story and a favor to ask. Want to hear it?
Traditional_Chinese: 我有個有趣的故事，也想請你幫個忙。想聽嗎？

English: I don’t know if you’re aware, but there are many races in this world. For some reason, I’m especially drawn to beastfolk, so I’ve been looking for information about them.
Traditional_Chinese: 我不知道你是否清楚，這世界上存在著許多種族。不知為何，我特別對獸人族感興趣，所以一直在蒐集和他們有關的情報。

English: I found some clues, secured funding, formed an expedition, and sent them to a rumored location. But… I still haven’t heard anything back.
Traditional_Chinese: 我找到了一些線索，籌到了資金，組成了一支探險隊，並把他們送往傳聞中的地點。不過……到現在還是沒有任何消息。

English: There should have been at least a letter by now. My investors keep nagging me to take responsibility, but the mayor of Saint City, who invested the most, hasn’t said a single word. Isn’t it obvious he knows something? Could you ask him about the expedition for me?
Traditional_Chinese: 照理說現在至少也該有封信了。我的投資人不停逼我負責，但投資最多的聖城城主卻一句話都沒說。這不是很明顯嗎？他肯定知道些什麼。你能替我去問問他關於探險隊的事嗎？

English: Thank you! You know where to find him.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你！你知道該去哪裡找他。

English: Come back if you change your mind. I’ll be waiting.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你改變主意，就回來吧。我會在這裡等你。

English: Did you ask him? I’d go myself, but… I’m too afraid to face him.
Traditional_Chinese: 你問過他了嗎？要是可以我也想親自去……但我實在太害怕面對他。

English: Oh, a great adventurer. What brings you here?
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，一位偉大的冒險者。是什麼風把你吹來了？

English: Meet with the Mayor of Saint City
Traditional_Chinese: 去見聖城城主

English: The Truth of the Expedition
Traditional_Chinese: 探險隊的真相

English: Ah, I see. Did the Strange Collector send you?
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，我懂了。是那位奇怪的收藏家叫你來的嗎？

English: I have nothing to tell you about that. Just go back.
Traditional_Chinese: 那件事我無可奉告。回去吧。

English: Hmm? If not, then why did you come to me?
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯？如果不是，那你為什麼來找我？

English: Even for you, I have nothing more to say.
Traditional_Chinese: 就算是你，我也沒有更多可說的了。

English: Hmm? Do I know anything about the mayor?
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯？我知道市長的事嗎？

English: Meet with Helgar
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 海佳樂

English: Trapped in the Maze
Traditional_Chinese: 困在迷宮中

English: Well… I don’t know much, but lately the mayor of Flaris has been visiting his house quite often. Why don’t you try talking to Flarine?
Traditional_Chinese: 這個嘛……我知道的不多，不過最近布拉里斯的市長常常去他家。你何不試著去問問布拉里斯市長？

English: You know the way, right?
Traditional_Chinese: 你知道路怎麼走吧？

English: You’re the one asking, and yet… If it’s nothing important, could you step aside?
Traditional_Chinese: 是你在問我，結果……如果不是什麼重要的事，可以請你讓一讓嗎？

English: That’s all I know. Go see Flarine.
Traditional_Chinese: 我知道的就只有這些。去找布拉里斯市長吧。

English: Hmm? It’s been a while. What brings you here?
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯？好久不見了。你來這裡有什麼事？

English: Meet with the Mayor of Flarine
Traditional_Chinese: 去見布拉里斯市長

English: Friend’s Testimony
Traditional_Chinese: 朋友的證詞

English: Actually… something like this was found in western Flaris.
Traditional_Chinese: 其實……像這樣的東西是在布拉里斯西部發現的。

English: Look at this Saint City logo. I thought I should let him know, so I brought it to him.
Traditional_Chinese: 你看這個聖城的標誌。我覺得應該要讓他知道，所以就帶給他看了。

English: But more pieces like this keep turning up, so I’ve been visiting him often.
Traditional_Chinese: 可是像這樣的碎片越來越常被發現，所以我才會經常去找他。

English: He was shocked when he saw it, took it away, and told me not to speak of it to anyone. Do you want this?
Traditional_Chinese: 他一看到就大受震驚，立刻把它拿走，還叫我別對任何人提起。你想要這個嗎？

English: As far as I know, these pieces came from the central region of the Leren Mountains. Fortunately for him, powerful masquerpets wander the area, keeping people away and stopping any rumors from spreading. But that shouldn’t be a problem for you.
Traditional_Chinese: 據我所知，這些碎片來自勒倫山脈中央區域。幸運的是，那裡有強大的 masquerpets 四處徘徊，讓一般人無法靠近，也阻止了流言傳開。不過對你來說，這應該不是問題。

English: Hmm? You don’t need it? Well, I can’t give you this piece, but if you need another one, feel free to ask.
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯？你不需要嗎？好吧，這塊碎片我不能給你，但如果你需要別的，再來找我。

English: I’ve already told you where it is, haven’t I? Someone like you shouldn’t have any trouble handling the monsters there and finding what you need.
Traditional_Chinese: 我不是已經告訴你在哪裡了嗎？像你這樣的人，處理那邊的怪物、找到你要的東西，應該不成問題。

English: Wait… this is…! How did you get this?
Traditional_Chinese: 等等……這是……！你是怎麼拿到這個的？

English: Find “Fragment of ???”
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找「？？？的碎片」

English: His True Intention
Traditional_Chinese: 他的真正意圖

English: Now that you’ve come this far, I have no choice but to tell you everything. Are you ready? That fragment is from the ship the expedition used when they set sail.
Traditional_Chinese: 既然你都查到這裡了，我也只能把一切都告訴你。你準備好了嗎？那塊碎片來自探險隊啟航時所乘坐的那艘船。

English: How do I know that from a single piece of debris? Because I was involved in everything—from its design to its construction. But so far, all we’ve found are scattered fragments like this.
Traditional_Chinese: 你問我怎麼能只憑一塊殘骸就知道？因為從設計到建造，整件事我都有參與。可到目前為止，我們找到的都只有像這樣的零散碎片。

English: I’ve done my best to stop the news from spreading, but there’s only so much I can do. At this point, I have no one left to turn to but you. Could you help find more clues about the expedition?
Traditional_Chinese: 我已經盡力不讓消息外傳，但我能做的也有限。事到如今，我已經沒有其他人可以依靠了，只能拜託你。你願意幫我繼續追查探險隊的線索嗎？

English: Thank you. The expedition followed the Darkon 1 mountain range. Start searching from there.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你。探險隊當初是沿著得肯第一區山脈前進的。你就從那裡開始搜尋吧。

English: So even my last hope is fading. If you change your mind, please come back.
Traditional_Chinese: 看來連我最後的希望也在消失。如果你改變主意，請再回來。

English: Have you found anything? Oh… this is getting serious.
Traditional_Chinese: 你有找到什麼嗎？喔……事情真的越來越嚴重了。

English: Welcome, adventurer. Hmm? What is this?
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎你，冒險者。嗯？這是什麼？

English: Bring “Fragment of a Fallen Ship” to the Darken Mayor
Traditional_Chinese: 把「墜落船隻的碎片」帶給得肯市長

English: Seeking the Witness… 1
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找目擊者……1

English: Well… I don’t know anything about this shipwreck, but there is someone who might.
