Traditional_Chinese: 這個嘛……我對這艘失事船隻一無所知，不過有個人也許知道些什麼。

English: A High-Dwarpet named Liekyen might know something. You should go see him.
Traditional_Chinese: 有位名叫利綺安的高階杜爾沛，也許知道一些線索。你應該去找他談談。

English: Of course, you can search elsewhere first if you prefer.
Traditional_Chinese: 當然，如果你想先去別的地方調查也可以。

English: You haven’t gone yet? That’s really all I can think of.
Traditional_Chinese: 你還沒出發嗎？我真的只能想到這個人了。

English: A shipwreck? Ah… you mean that one.
Traditional_Chinese: 失事船？啊……你是說那艘啊。

English: Meet with Liekyen
Traditional_Chinese: 去見利綺安

English: Seeking the Witness… 2
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找目擊者……2

English: It was deep in the mountains. I saw a shadow and thought it was a monster… but it turned out to be a ship falling from the sky.
Traditional_Chinese: 那是在山裡深處。我看到一個黑影，還以為是怪物……結果居然是一艘從天上掉下來的船。

English: There was no one on board, even when I searched it the first time. Not a single body. I checked around to see if there was anything useful, but all I found was a book full of strange codes. Curious what it says?
Traditional_Chinese: 我第一次搜查時，船上根本沒有人。連一具屍體都沒有。我四處查看有沒有什麼有用的東西，結果只找到一本寫滿奇怪代碼的書。想知道裡面寫了什麼嗎？

English: I couldn’t make heads or tails of it, so I handed it over to Inisis. If you’re interested, go talk to her.
Traditional_Chinese: 我完全看不懂，所以就把它交給 伊尼斯 了。如果你有興趣，就去找她聊聊吧。

English: Not curious? Well, that’s your choice.
Traditional_Chinese: 不好奇嗎？那也是你的選擇。

English: Inisis knows the details. If she finishes deciphering it, could you come back and tell me what she found?
Traditional_Chinese: 伊尼斯 知道詳情。如果她成功解讀完畢，你能回來告訴我她發現了什麼嗎？

English: Ah, you’ve come for the logbook?
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，你是為了航海日誌來的？

English: Meet with Inisis
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 伊尼斯

English: Searching for Clues… 1
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找線索……1

English: It turned out to be just a simple sailing logbook. There’s nothing special written in it. Are you still looking for more clues?
Traditional_Chinese: 結果它只是一份普通的航海日誌，裡面沒寫什麼特別的東西。你還想繼續追查更多線索嗎？

English: Actually, after reading it, Amadolka decided to search the Darken mountains again to see if anything else turns up. You should meet him before heading back to Saint City.
Traditional_Chinese: 其實，看完之後，亞瑪多決定再去得肯山脈調查一次，看是否還能找到其他東西。你回聖音特城之前，應該先去見見他。

English: If you’re too busy, I understand. Take care of yourself.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你太忙了，我也能理解。多保重。

English: You haven’t left yet?
Traditional_Chinese: 你還沒出發嗎？

English: Inisis sent you?
Traditional_Chinese: 是 伊尼斯 叫你來的？

English: Meet with Amadolka
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 亞瑪多

English: Searching for Clues… 2
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找線索……2

English: That sharp woman… How did she know to send you without me saying anything? Do you really need this?
Traditional_Chinese: 那個精明的女人……我明明什麼都沒說，她怎麼知道該叫你來？你真的需要這個嗎？

English: Sigh… Fine, take it. You can find it right next to me. I tried to analyze that material at Erons Factory, but I couldn’t even figure out what it’s made of.
Traditional_Chinese: 唉……好吧，拿去。就在我旁邊。當初我試著在 Erons Factory 分析這種材料，結果連它是什麼做成都搞不清楚。

English: If you manage to discover anything, let me know. I guess I owe you one now.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你查出什麼，記得告訴我。看來我現在欠你一個人情了。

English: So I can keep this? Tch… the more I look at it, the more uneasy I feel. Just take it and go.
Traditional_Chinese: 所以這個我可以留著？嘖……越看越讓人不安。你還是快拿走吧。

English: This logbook…!
Traditional_Chinese: 這本航海日誌……！

English: Find “Trace of the New Continent”
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找「新大陸的痕跡」

English: The Gear Begins to Turn Again
Traditional_Chinese: 齒輪再次轉動

English: So that’s how it was… What on earth happened to the crew of that ship? For now, let me examine this strange material.
Traditional_Chinese: 原來是這樣……那艘船上的船員到底發生了什麼事？總之，先讓我來檢查這種奇怪的材料。

English: I can use it to calm the investors. With this logbook, we might even be able to send a follow-up expedition. Hmm… Could you show the logbook and this material to the Strange Collector?
Traditional_Chinese: 我可以拿它去安撫那些投資人。有了這本航海日誌，我們甚至可能可以籌備後續探險。嗯……你能把這本日誌和這份材料拿去給那位奇怪的收藏家看看嗎？

English: He should be the first to know. Thank you.
Traditional_Chinese: 他應該是第一個知道的人。謝謝你。

English: Well, if you change your mind, you can come back anytime.
Traditional_Chinese: 好吧，如果你改變主意，隨時都可以回來。

English: Have you shown it to him yet? Don’t worry, I’m not rushing you.
Traditional_Chinese: 你已經拿去給他看了嗎？別擔心，我不是在催你。

English: Welcome back. How did it go? I knew it—my research wasn’t wrong after all. I truly owe you. It’s not much, but please accept this as my thanks. Things are going to get busy from here on…
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎回來。情況如何？我就知道——我的研究果然沒有錯。我真的欠你很多。雖然不算什麼，但請收下這份謝禮吧。從現在開始，事情恐怕會變得忙碌起來……

English: Meet with the Strange Collector
Traditional_Chinese: 去見奇怪的收藏家

English: Chapter 2 Eillun Town
Traditional_Chinese: 第二章 艾爾倫村

English: Reignited Passion
Traditional_Chinese: 重新燃起的熱情

English: Adventurer, you’ve come at the perfect time. We’re preparing a second expedition based on the logbook you found.
Traditional_Chinese: 冒險者，你來得正是時候。我們正在根據你找到的航海日誌準備第二次探險。

English: This time, we plan to send a scouting party before the main group. Would you be willing to be part of that team?
Traditional_Chinese: 這一次，我們打算在主力出發前，先派出一支偵察隊。你願意成為那支隊伍的一員嗎？

English: Go see the mayor of Saint City.
Traditional_Chinese: 去見聖城城主。

English: I don’t think anyone is better suited for this than you. But there’s still some time before we depart, so you can decide at your own pace.
Traditional_Chinese: 我想沒有比你更適合這件事的人了。不過距離出發還有一點時間，你可以慢慢決定。

English: You know where the mayor is, right?
Traditional_Chinese: 你知道市長在哪裡吧？

English: Welcome, adventurer.
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎，冒險者。

English: Scout Party
Traditional_Chinese: 偵察隊

English: Thanks to what you brought back, I convinced the other investors, and we’ve decided to organize a second expedition. But considering the first expedition vanished and their ship crashed…
Traditional_Chinese: 多虧你帶回來的東西，我成功說服了其他投資人，我們也決定籌組第二次探險。不過，考慮到第一次探險全數失蹤，連船都墜毀了……

English: If we send another group out without understanding what happened, we risk the same disaster. That’s why we plan to send a scouting team first to investigate. Will you take on that role?
Traditional_Chinese: 如果我們在還不知道發生什麼事的情況下，又派出新的一隊人，那很可能會重蹈覆轍。因此我們打算先派出偵察隊調查。你願意接下這個角色嗎？

English: After reviewing the logbook, it seems we need to go even farther north, beyond the Gouthan Mountains of Darkon. It looks like there’s some kind of docking point there, so if you arrive safely, you should be able to land.
Traditional_Chinese: 檢視航海日誌後，看來我們得再往北前進，越過得肯的古坦山脈。那裡似乎有某種停泊點，所以如果你安全抵達，應該就能順利著陸。

English: No matter how I look at it, you’re the only one fit for this job. I’ll be waiting for your answer.
Traditional_Chinese: 不管怎麼看，這份工作都只有你最適合。我會等你的答覆。

English: Good luck, adventurer. May your flight be a safe one.
Traditional_Chinese: 祝你好運，冒險者。願你飛行平安。

English: Finally… I’m saved! I survived!
Traditional_Chinese: 終於……我得救了！我活下來了！

English: Meet with [Expedition] Beck
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [遠征隊] 貝克

English: Straggler
Traditional_Chinese: 落單者

English: Good to meet you. I’m Beck from Saint City. I… well, I was part of the expedition. Beasts attacked us, and I got separated from the others.
Traditional_Chinese: 很高興見到你。我叫貝克，來自聖音特城。我……呃，原本是探險隊的一員。野獸襲擊了我們，我和其他人失散了。

English: Our captain didn’t even check if everyone was on board before taking off. When the attack started, I just happened to be wasting time in the forest. Thanks to that, I survived.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們的隊長起飛前甚至沒確認大家是不是都上船了。襲擊發生時，我剛好在森林裡閒晃，所以才僥倖活了下來。

English: A second expedition? That’s a relief. I’ll join them and go home as soon as they arrive. But… could I ask you for a favor?
Traditional_Chinese: 第二次探險？那真是太好了。等他們一到，我就要加入他們，立刻回家。不過……我能拜託你一件事嗎？

English: I lost my serial number chain while fleeing from those beasts. I searched where I dropped it, but it was gone. It might still be somewhere nearby. Could you go and look for it? Please, I’m counting on you.
Traditional_Chinese: 我在逃離那些野獸時，把我的序號鍊弄丟了。我回頭找過掉落的地方，但已經不見了。它可能還在附近的某個地方。你能幫我去找找看嗎？拜託了，我真的只能靠你了。

English: If you change your mind, please come back.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你改變主意，請再回來。

English: Those creatures went that way!
Traditional_Chinese: 那些傢伙往那邊去了！

English: I can’t thank you enough for your help. While you were gone, some beastmen—different from the ones that attacked me—showed up. They gave me food and pointed out a place before leaving. Eat something, then head over there.
Traditional_Chinese: 真的不知道該怎麼感謝你。你離開的時候，有些獸人——和襲擊我的那些不同——出現了。他們給了我食物，還指了一個地方給我看，然後就離開了。你先吃點東西，再往那裡去吧。

English: Gather 10 Abandoned Serial Number Chains
Traditional_Chinese: 蒐集 10 個被遺棄的序號鍊

English: Proficiency Test
Traditional_Chinese: 實力測驗

English: Oy! Halt! Who are you? …That’s quite a story. Suspicious. Are you a Lycan spy? If not, prove it.
Traditional_Chinese: 喂！站住！你是誰？……故事倒是編得不錯。真可疑。你是 Lycan 的間諜嗎？如果不是，就證明給我看。

English: Defeat 20 Hundur Sharpfoots, and then I’ll believe you.
Traditional_Chinese: 打敗 20 個百夏足怪，我才會相信你。

English: Hmph! I knew it. You must be a spy!
Traditional_Chinese: 哼！我就知道。你果然是間諜！

English: What? You can’t even handle that? Pathetic. There’s no way I can let you into the village like this.
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼？連那種程度都應付不了？真可悲。這種樣子我可不能讓你進村。

English: (Hmm… seems stronger than me…)
Traditional_Chinese: (嗯……好像比我還強……)

English: Kill 20 Hundur Sharpfoots
Traditional_Chinese: 獵殺 20 隻百夏足

English: Territorial Cats
Traditional_Chinese: 領地上的貓

English: That’s still not enough to convince me. I don’t even know who you really are. If you want to live alongside our village, you’ll need to prove yourself with your strength. Then at least we can rely on each other.
Traditional_Chinese: 這樣還不足以讓我相信你。我甚至連你究竟是誰都不知道。如果你想在我們村子裡生活，就得用實力證明自己。至少那樣我們才能彼此依靠。

English: If you’re serious about proving yourself, defeat Captain Hundur Sharpfoot and bring me proof.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你真的想證明自己，那就打敗百夏足頭目，然後把證據帶給我。

English: At your current level, it might be difficult. I understand.
Traditional_Chinese: 以你目前的等級來說，這可能有點困難。我能理解。

English: Still not done? When exactly do you plan to enter the village?
Traditional_Chinese: 還沒完成？你到底打算什麼時候進村？

English: (Seriously…?) You’re struggling with just those? Hah… well, I guess you tried. Go on, someone will guide you inside.
Traditional_Chinese: (真的假的……？) 只是那些你也打得這麼辛苦？哈……算了，至少你有試過。進去吧，會有人帶你入村。

English: Kill 11 Captain Hundur Sharpfoots and bring 1 Piece of Hundur Bone
Traditional_Chinese: 獵殺 11 名百夏足頭目，並帶回 1 塊百骨。

English: New Town Life?
Traditional_Chinese: 新城鎮生活？

English: Welcome, stranger. You’re now in Eillun Town, the refuge of the Myurangs. Wait, you defeated Captain Hundur Sharpfoot? Ah, so you fell for his trick. I only sent him out for training because he’s always slacking off.
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎，陌生人。你現在來到了艾爾倫村，米尤朗人的避難所。等等，你打敗了百夏足頭目？啊，原來你中了他的圈套。我派他出去訓練只是因為他總是偷懶。

English: Don’t worry, I’ll give him a much harsher assignment next time. To stay in this village, you’ll need the captain’s approval. He’s strict, so expect more tests.
Traditional_Chinese: 別擔心，下次我會給他更嚴苛的任務。想留在這個村子裡，就必須得到隊長的許可。他很嚴格，所以你最好做好再接受考驗的準備。

English: You can find him over there. Go talk to him yourself.
Traditional_Chinese: 你可以在那邊找到他。自己去跟他談吧。

English: What will he ask you to do? No idea.
Traditional_Chinese: 他會叫你做什麼？我哪知道。

English: Just know that without his approval, you won’t be able to do much in this village.
Traditional_Chinese: 你只要知道，沒有他的許可，你在這個村子裡什麼都做不了。

English: Who are you?
Traditional_Chinese: 介紹

English: Meet with [Captain] Baron
Traditional_Chinese: 與 [隊長] 巴倫會面

English: Captain’s Test 1
Traditional_Chinese: 船長的考驗 1

English: A hairless outsider in our village… What were the guards doing? So, you want to stay here? We’re at war with the Lycans. For all I know, you might be one of their spies. I can’t allow you to stay without proof.
Traditional_Chinese: 一個沒毛的外來者竟然出現在我們村裡……守衛到底在幹什麼？所以，你想留在這裡？我們正和萊坎交戰。誰知道你會不會是他們派來的間諜。我不能在沒有證明的情況下讓你留下。

English: Kill 25 Small Samosets. That’ll at least get us talking.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 25 隻小薩莫賽特。至少先讓我們有得談。

English: If you can’t handle something that simple, I can’t let you in.
Traditional_Chinese: 要是連這點小事都做不到，我可不能讓你進村。

English: If you finish quickly, you’ll be able to use the village facilities sooner.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你動作夠快，就能更早使用村裡的設施。

English: Already done? Alright. I can say you’re not one of those dog spies.
Traditional_Chinese: 已經完成了？好吧，我可以認定你不是那些狗間諜之一。

English: Kill 25 Small Samosets
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 25 隻小薩莫賽特

English: Captain’s Test 2
Traditional_Chinese: 船長的考驗 2

English: But staying in town is a different matter. We’ve received reports that the enemies you defeated are gathering in one place.
Traditional_Chinese: 不過，能不能留在村裡又是另一回事。我們收到通報，說你剛剛打倒的那些敵人正在某地集結。

English: I’ll tell you where. Go there and take them out before they can plan anything.
Traditional_Chinese: 我會告訴你位置。去那裡，在他們開始策劃什麼之前先把他們解決掉。

English: It’s your choice, but if you want to stay, you’ll have to deal with them eventually.
Traditional_Chinese: 這是你的選擇，但如果你想留在這裡，遲早都得處理掉他們。

English: We need to crush them before they attack the village. That’s what matters.
Traditional_Chinese: 重點是，我們得在他們攻擊村莊前先把他們擊潰。

English: Impressive. I underestimated you. My apologies.
Traditional_Chinese: 令人印象深刻。是我低估你了，抱歉。

English: Kill 15 Samosets
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 15 隻 薩莫塞特

English: Captain’s Test 3
Traditional_Chinese: 船長的考驗 3

English: There are even more reinforcements gathering. Sadly, our troops are tied up elsewhere and can’t handle them right now. This is the last task—teach them a lesson.
Traditional_Chinese: 還有更多援軍正在集結。可惜我們的部隊被別的地方牽制住，現在沒辦法處理他們。這是最後一項任務——給他們一點教訓吧。

English: Defeat Captain Samoset and bring back proof. Then I’ll grant you permission to stay.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗薩莫賽特隊長，並帶回證明。這樣我就會核發你居留許可。

English: You’d better decide before they launch an attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 你最好在他們發動攻擊前做出決定。

English: Still not finished? Hmm…
Traditional_Chinese: 還沒完成嗎？嗯……

English: Well done. I’ll issue your residency permit.
Traditional_Chinese: 做得好。我會替你發放居留許可。

English: Kill 10 Captain Samosets and bring 1 Piece of Samoset Bone
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 10 隻薩莫賽特隊長，並帶回 1 塊薩莫賽特骨片。

English: Where Did the Expedition Go 1
Traditional_Chinese: 遠征隊去了哪裡 1

English: So, what brought you all the way here? Hmm… I don’t remember seeing anything like that. I rarely leave the forest, so I wouldn’t know.
Traditional_Chinese: 所以，你大老遠跑到這裡來是為了什麼？嗯……我不記得見過那種東西。我很少離開森林，所以也不會知道。

English: Wait… yes, there were reports of several loud explosions from the east. I’m not sure if it’s related, but do you want to check it out?
Traditional_Chinese: 等等……對了，之前確實有報告說東邊傳來幾次很大的爆炸聲。我不確定跟這件事有沒有關係，但你想去看看嗎？

English: It’s not far, but it’s Lycan territory. We haven’t been able to investigate. If you find anything, bring it to me. I’ll help you examine it.
Traditional_Chinese: 那裡不遠，但已經是萊坎的地盤。我們一直沒辦法過去調查。要是你發現了什麼，就帶回來給我。我可以幫你檢查。

English: You might find other clues elsewhere too. Don’t worry if you want to follow your own leads.
Traditional_Chinese: 你也可能會在其他地方找到線索。如果你想照自己的方式追查，也不用擔心。

English: You should be fine, but stay careful.
Traditional_Chinese: 你應該沒問題，但還是要小心。

English: Did you find what you were looking for? You found this there?
Traditional_Chinese: 你找到你想找的東西了嗎？你是在那裡找到這個的？

English: Search the forest and obtain “Unknown Fur Ball”
Traditional_Chinese: 搜尋森林並取得「未知毛球」

English: Where Did the Expedition Go 2
Traditional_Chinese: 遠征隊去了哪裡 2

English: This is Kyouchish fur. Kyouchish are elite Lycan warriors.
Traditional_Chinese: 這是丘奇什的毛。丘奇什是萊坎中的精銳戰士。

English: It seems they attacked and wiped out the remaining members of that expedition. Since their territory was invaded by that large group, they’re probably still on high alert around there.
Traditional_Chinese: 看來就是牠們襲擊並殲滅了那支遠征隊剩下的人。那麼大一群人闖進牠們的領地後，牠們現在大概還在那附近保持高度警戒。

English: If you defeat some Small Kyouchish and bring back any written orders or notes, I’ll translate them for you.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你擊倒一些小丘奇什，再帶回牠們的書面命令或筆記，我可以幫你翻譯。

English: Do you have a better lead than this?
Traditional_Chinese: 你有比這更好的線索嗎？

English: You remember the place, right?
Traditional_Chinese: 你還記得那個地方吧？

English: Ah, you got it. Let me see…
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，你拿到了。讓我看看……

English: Kill 25 Small Kyouchish and get 1 Lycan Operation Plan
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 25 隻小丘奇什，並取得 1 份萊坎作戰計畫。

English: Investigation Begins
Traditional_Chinese: 調查開始

English: Hmm, this won’t take long. In the meantime, how about hunting some Kyouchish?
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯，這用不了多久。在那之前，不如先去獵幾隻丘奇什吧？

English: They’re near the enemy camp.
Traditional_Chinese: 他們就在敵方營地附近。

English: If you don’t feel like it, I won’t force you. Come back if you change your mind.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你不想做，我也不會勉強你。改變主意再回來吧。

English: It’s best to finish this quickly. I’ll have the translation ready when you return.
Traditional_Chinese: 最好快點完成。我會在你回來前把翻譯準備好。

English: Back already? The translation’s done. Here, take it.
Traditional_Chinese: 已經回來了？翻譯完成了。來，拿去吧。

English: Kill 25 Kyouchish
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 25 隻 利爪奇什

English: The Expedition Is…
Traditional_Chinese: 遠征隊……

English: Did it say anything useful? Typical wolves—attack, pillage, and so on. Still, if it helps your search, that’s something.
Traditional_Chinese: 上面有寫什麼有用的嗎？典型的狼族風格——攻擊、掠奪之類的。不過如果這能幫上你的搜尋，至少也算有點價值。

English: So now… you’re heading back? That’s something you’ll need to report.
Traditional_Chinese: 所以現在……你要回去了？那就是你該回報的事情了。

English: Well, returning can wait.
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯，回去的事可以再等等。

English: I’ll inform the villagers so you can use our village freely afterward. Safe travels.
Traditional_Chinese: 之後我會通知村民，讓你可以自由使用我們的村莊。一路平安。

English: Oh, you’re back. How was the village?
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，你回來了。村莊那邊怎麼樣？

English: The Truth
Traditional_Chinese: 真相

English: So… the others… I’m the only survivor… sniff… Are you going back to Saint City?
Traditional_Chinese: 所以……其他人……只剩我一個倖存者了……嗚……你要回聖城嗎？

English: Please tell them I’m alive. I’ll join the second expedition when they arrive and return home. I don’t want to stay in this land any longer. I know it’s a lot to ask, but… could you avenge my fallen comrades before you leave for Madrigal?
Traditional_Chinese: 請告訴他們我還活著。等第二支遠征隊來時，我會和他們會合並一起回家。我再也不想待在這片土地上了。這要求或許太過分，但……在你回瑪德利賈前，你能替我為那些死去的同伴報仇嗎？

English: I heard a particularly loud howl. Everything went quiet afterward, so I’m sure that was their leader. Can you defeat him?
Traditional_Chinese: 我聽到了一聲特別響亮的嚎叫，之後四周就安靜下來了，所以我敢肯定那一定是牠們的首領。你能擊敗牠嗎？

English: Oh… I see. I guess it can’t be helped. Never mind, then.
Traditional_Chinese: 喔……我明白了。看來這也是沒辦法的事。那就算了吧。

English: The howl came from that direction. I doubt it went far.
Traditional_Chinese: 那聲嚎叫是從那個方向傳來的。我不覺得牠跑得太遠。

English: Ah, you’re back. So, was there really a new continent?
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，你回來了。所以，那裡真的有新大陸嗎？

English: Kill 10 Captain Kyouchish
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 10 隻 利爪奇什頭目

English: Report
Traditional_Chinese: 回報

English: There was? Then… did you find any trace of the expedition? My gods… what a disaster. At least there’s one survivor. For now, we must keep this quiet.
Traditional_Chinese: 真的有？那麼……你找到遠征隊的任何蹤跡了嗎？天啊……真是一場災難。至少還有一名倖存者。暫時，我們必須把這件事保密。

English: We can’t hide it forever, of course, but if we reveal it now, everything we’re planning will collapse. I’ll make an official announcement when we begin recruiting for the second expedition. Did you meet the Strange Collector?
Traditional_Chinese: 當然不可能永遠瞞下去，但如果現在公開，我們正在籌劃的一切都會崩潰。等到開始招募第二支遠征隊時，我會正式對外公告。你有見到那位奇怪的收藏家嗎？

English: Please tell them I’m alive. I’ll join the second expedition when they arrive and return home. I don’t want to stay in this land any longer. I know it’s a lot to ask, but… could you avenge my fallen comrades before you leave for Madrigal?
Traditional_Chinese: 請告訴他們我還活著。等第二支遠征隊來時，我會和他們會合並一起回家。我再也不想待在這片土地上了。這要求或許太過分，但……在你回瑪德利賈前，你能替我為那些死去的同伴報仇嗎？

English: He’s waiting for you. You should go see him.
Traditional_Chinese: 他在等你。你應該去見見他。

English: He’s your employer, after all. You’re probably exhausted from flying and fighting, but shouldn’t you visit him?
Traditional_Chinese: 畢竟他是你的雇主。你大概已經因為飛行和戰鬥而筋疲力盡了，但不去見他真的好嗎？

English: He’s still at his usual place. You know where that is.
Traditional_Chinese: 他還是在老地方。你知道在哪裡。

English: You’re back. Good. I can sense good news.
Traditional_Chinese: 你回來了。很好。我能感覺到這次會有好消息。

English: Back to the New World
Traditional_Chinese: 重返新世界

English: I was certain, but… to think my research really was correct. I’d love to visit that continent myself, but I need to stay here and handle preparations. Can you go ahead and investigate further?
Traditional_Chinese: 我原本就很確定，但……沒想到我的研究竟然真的正確。我很想親自去那塊大陸看看，不過我得留在這裡處理後續準備。你能先替我過去繼續調查嗎？

English: Thank you. I hope we meet again there soon.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你。希望我們很快就能在那裡再次見面。

English: You know you’re the only one suited for this. If you change your mind, let me know. I’ll make it worth your while.
Traditional_Chinese: 你知道的，現在只有你最適合這件事。如果你改變主意，告訴我吧。我會讓你覺得值得。

English: You’re still here… When do you think you’ll leave?
Traditional_Chinese: 你還在這裡……你打算什麼時候出發？

English: Back again? What’s going on this time?
Traditional_Chinese: 又回來了？這次又怎麼了？

English: Chapter 3 Prelude
Traditional_Chinese: 第 3 章 序幕

English: Meeting with Elders
Traditional_Chinese: 與長老們會面

English: Oh? You want to know more about us?
Traditional_Chinese: 喔？你想多了解我們？

English: Then you should speak with the jarl or one of the elders. They’ve lived long and know our history well. However, it won’t be easy for an outsider to meet the jarl. I’ll introduce you to my superior, one of the elders. I’ll tell him in advance so you can go straight to him.
Traditional_Chinese: 那你應該去找領主或其中一位長老。他們活得夠久，也最了解我們的歷史。不過，外人想見領主可不容易。我可以先替你介紹我的上司——其中一位長老。我會事先告知他，這樣你就能直接去見他。

English: Well… you could try finding them on your own too.
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯……你也可以試著自己去找看看。

English: The elder is busy, so if you want to meet him quickly, you should hurry.
Traditional_Chinese: 長老很忙，所以如果你想盡快見到他，最好快點動身。

English: So, you’re the one the captain mentioned.
Traditional_Chinese: 所以，你就是船長提到的那個人。

English: Meet with [Elder] Melak
Traditional_Chinese: 與 [長老] 梅拉克會面

English: Help Muran!
Traditional_Chinese: 幫助穆蘭！

English: I don’t mind telling you about our village, but I have a favor to ask first.
Traditional_Chinese: 我不介意告訴你關於我們村莊的事，但在那之前，我有個請求。

English: As you know, we Muran are at war with the Lycans, and we’re badly outnumbered. I’ve heard you’ve already defeated quite a few of them. While you’re here, I’d like you to support our young warriors.
Traditional_Chinese: 如你所知，我們穆蘭正與萊坎交戰，而且在人數上明顯居於劣勢。我聽說你已經擊敗了不少他們的人。既然你人在這裡，我希望你能幫忙支援我們年輕的戰士。

English: If you have more urgent matters, I understand. You can return when you’re free.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你有更緊急的事，我能理解。等你有空再回來吧。

English: We can continue our talk afterwards.
Traditional_Chinese: 之後我們再繼續談。

English: You’ve done an incredible job.
Traditional_Chinese: 你做得非常出色。

English: Complete 30 daily quests in Eillun Town
Traditional_Chinese: 在 艾爾倫村 完成 30 個每日任務

English: Where Is the Mole
Traditional_Chinese: 內鬼在哪裡

English: Thanks to you, life in the village—and even the war—has become a bit more manageable. I should answer your questions as thanks, but… I have one more thing to ask.
Traditional_Chinese: 多虧有你，村裡的生活——甚至整場戰爭——都稍微好過了一些。我本來應該回答你的問題作為感謝，不過……我還有一件事想請你幫忙。

English: We suspect there’s a Lycan spy in a high position. Our operations keep getting sabotaged, and supplies for one squad were stolen. Can you investigate and, if possible, get them back?
Traditional_Chinese: 我們懷疑有一名身居高位的萊坎間諜。我們的行動一再遭到破壞，其中一支小隊的補給也被偷走了。你能幫忙調查，若有可能，也把東西奪回來嗎？

English: I hate to burden you, but there’s no one else I can trust with this.
Traditional_Chinese: 我不想增加你的負擔，但現在已經沒有人是我能信任的了。

English: The last known location was here. If they’re acting as they usually do, they shouldn’t be far.
Traditional_Chinese: 最後一次目擊的位置就在這裡。如果他們還照平常的習慣行動，應該不會離太遠。

English: He… he was the spy?
Traditional_Chinese: 他……他就是間諜？

English: Get 50 Stolen Supplies and 1 Secret Letter
Traditional_Chinese: 取得 50 份被竊補給品與 1 封密信。

English: Hunt the Mole
Traditional_Chinese: 追捕內鬼

English: We had reports that he left the village in a hurry, but… to think a village elder would betray us. It’s tragic, but we don’t have enough soldiers to both defend the village and track him. Could you do it?
Traditional_Chinese: 我們接到報告說他匆匆離開了村子，但……沒想到連村裡的長老都會背叛我們。這太令人痛心了，但我們沒有足夠的士兵同時守村又去追他。你能去嗎？

English: If possible, bring him back alive. If not… eliminate him. Smaller Kanonicus were carrying stolen supplies and a secret letter. He should still be nearby.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果可能，盡量把他活著帶回來。如果不行……就除掉他。那些較小的卡諾尼庫斯身上帶著被竊的補給和一封密信。他應該還在附近。

English: Right now, you’re the only one who can move freely. We’ll be waiting.
Traditional_Chinese: 現在，只有你還能自由行動。我們會在這裡等你。

English: We must make an example of this traitor, or the village won’t be safe for long. Please, see it through.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們必須拿這個叛徒殺雞儆猴，不然村莊很快就不會再安全。拜託你，一定要處理到底。

English: You did well. Here, I’ve compiled what you were looking for. Take your time reading it—you’ll learn plenty about our history.
Traditional_Chinese: 你做得很好。來，這是我整理好的資料，就是你在找的東西。慢慢讀吧——你會從中了解不少我們的歷史。

English: Kill [Elder] Traitus
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 [長老] 特萊圖斯

English: About Muran
Traditional_Chinese: 關於穆蘭

English: Thinking of all the chaos that traitor caused… honestly. Anyway, it seems your name has spread. A lot of people around the village have been asking to meet you. Once you’re done with your own business, why not visit them?
Traditional_Chinese: 想到那個叛徒造成的混亂……真是的。總之，看來你的名字已經傳開了。村裡有不少人都想見你。等你忙完自己的事，不妨去看看他們吧？

English: Of course, take care of your matters first.
Traditional_Chinese: 當然，先把你的事情處理完吧。

English: Hmm… you have more admirers in the village than you realize.
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯……你在村裡的仰慕者比你想像得還多。

English: I’ve narrowed it down to three or four people for now.
Traditional_Chinese: 目前我先篩出了三、四個人。

English: Oh, so you’ve learned something about the natives? A book written by the village elder himself… May I see it? I see… very nice work. If you learn anything else, be sure to share it.
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，所以你已經學到一些關於原住民的事情了？一本由村中長老親自撰寫的書……可以讓我看看嗎？我明白了……寫得真不錯。如果你之後還知道了什麼，務必要和我分享。

English: Bring “All About Muran!” to the Strange Collector
Traditional_Chinese: 把「關於穆蘭的一切！」帶給奇怪的收藏家。

English: Chapter 4 Climax
Traditional_Chinese: 第 4 章 高潮

English: An Incident! 1
Traditional_Chinese: 突發事件！1

English: Ah, you’re the adventurer who’s been helping us. Even though we’re at war, the village itself has always been peaceful… but lately, something feels wrong.
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，你就是那位一直在幫助我們的冒險者。雖然我們正在打仗，但村子本身一直都很平靜……可是最近，總覺得有些不對勁。

English: We’ve heard strange howls, and there are unusual claw marks on the trees in town. If you have time, could you help us investigate?
Traditional_Chinese: 我們聽見了奇怪的嚎叫聲，村裡樹上也出現了不尋常的爪痕。如果你有空，能幫我們調查一下嗎？

English: It looks like those Kanonicus have come too close to the village. Could you deal with them?
Traditional_Chinese: 看來那些卡諾尼庫斯已經逼近村子了。你能幫忙處理掉牠們嗎？

English: If it’s too much trouble, I’ll try to find someone else.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果太麻煩，我再去找其他人試試看。

English: Their usual gathering spot is the place I mentioned earlier. If you head that way, you should find something.
Traditional_Chinese: 牠們平常聚集的地方，就是我剛才提過的位置。你往那邊去，應該會找到些什麼。

English: Thank you for your hard work. But… even after thinning their numbers, the reports keep coming.
Traditional_Chinese: 辛苦你了。但是……即使削減了牠們的數量，相關通報還是一直傳來。

English: Kill 30 Kanonicus
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 30 隻 追獵者庫斯

English: An Incident! 2
Traditional_Chinese: 突發事件！2

English: It seems something has already slipped into the village. Our captain must have sensed it too—he’s ordered tighter security. But with so few guards, nobody can spare time to investigate.
Traditional_Chinese: 看來某種東西已經潛進村裡了。我們隊長一定也察覺到了——他下令加強戒備。但守衛太少，沒人抽得出空去調查。

English: Could you go around and ask the villagers if they’ve noticed anything strange? Thank you, truly.
Traditional_Chinese: 你能幫忙四處問問村民，看看他們有沒有注意到什麼異樣嗎？真的非常感謝。

English: Don’t worry about me, I’ll manage.
Traditional_Chinese: 別擔心我，我會想辦法處理。

English: I’ve already given you the list, remember? Please look into it.
Traditional_Chinese: 我不是已經把名單給你了嗎？請去查查看。

English: Have I noticed anything weird lately?
Traditional_Chinese: 我最近有注意到什麼奇怪的事嗎？

English: Meet with Rohan
Traditional_Chinese: 與羅漢會面

English: An Incident! 3
Traditional_Chinese: 突發事件！3

English: Hmm… well, the air feels different.
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯……嗯，空氣感覺不太一樣。

English: Only Myurang and adventurers live here, but I’ve caught a faint whiff of those wolf fiends. It was stronger near the southern outskirts. Maybe ask Artin? He’s a skilled hunter—he might have noticed more.
Traditional_Chinese: 這裡只有繆朗族和冒險者居住，但我確實聞到一股淡淡的狼族臭味。在南邊外圍附近味道更重。也許你該去問問阿爾汀？他是個老獵人，可能注意到更多細節。

English: Other than that? Hmm, let me think…
Traditional_Chinese: 除此之外嗎？嗯，讓我想想……

English: If you’re looking for Artin, head farther south.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你要找阿爾汀，就往更南邊去。

English: Something strange lately? Hmm…
Traditional_Chinese: 最近有什麼奇怪的事嗎？嗯……

English: Meet with Artin
Traditional_Chinese: 與阿爾汀會面

English: An Incident! 4
Traditional_Chinese: 突發事件！4

English: Oh, the wolf scent? I’m used to it from the forest, but… now that you mention it, yeah, I’ve noticed it too. sniff Hmm… will you believe me?
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，你是說狼的氣味？我在森林裡聞慣了，不過……現在你一提，我也確實有注意到。嗅嗅……嗯……你會相信我嗎？

English: I know it sounds crazy, but… Belia smells like a wolf. Could you check on her for me? I… I just can’t do it myself.
Traditional_Chinese: 我知道這聽起來很荒唐，但是……貝莉雅聞起來像狼。你能替我去看看她嗎？我……我自己實在做不到。

English: I don’t have the courage to see my friend turn out to be a traitor…
Traditional_Chinese: 我沒有勇氣看著自己的朋友竟然是個叛徒……

English: Belia… please…
Traditional_Chinese: 貝莉雅……拜託了……

English: Huh? You’re saying I smell like what? What kind of nonsense is that?
Traditional_Chinese: 蛤？你說我聞起來像什麼？你在胡說八道什麼啊？

English: Meet with Belia
Traditional_Chinese: 與貝莉雅會面

English: An Incident! 5
Traditional_Chinese: 突發事件！5

English: (Lycan) Damn it… how did you figure it out? I thought I’d fooled all these clueless cats, thanks to the Scroll of Skrolls our god gave me.
Traditional_Chinese: (萊坎) 可惡……你到底是怎麼看穿的？我還以為靠著我們神明賜下的斯克羅卷軸，已經把這群蠢貓全都騙過去了。

English: (Lycan) You’ve ruined too many of our plans already. Don’t think you’ll get away so easily. We’ll meet again.
Traditional_Chinese: (萊坎) 你已經壞了我們太多計畫。別以為你能這麼輕易脫身。我們還會再見面的。

English: (Lycan) You think we’d just let you walk away after uncovering our secret?
Traditional_Chinese: (萊坎) 你以為揭穿了我們的秘密後，我們還會讓你活著離開嗎？

English: What… I don’t remember the past few days at all. Are you saying they did that to me? Adventurer, you saved me. Thank you so much.
Traditional_Chinese: 什麼……我根本不記得這幾天發生了什麼。你是說，是他們對我做了那些事？冒險者，是你救了我。真的非常謝謝你。

English: Magic disguises… I never thought they were real. Belia taught our children—who knows what would’ve happened if that Lycan had stayed hidden. Thank you. I’ll report this to the elder.
Traditional_Chinese: 魔法偽裝……我從沒想過那是真的。貝莉雅還在教我們的孩子——如果那個萊坎一直躲著不被發現，後果真不敢想像。謝謝你。我會把這件事報告給長老。

English: Obtain “Fragment of Scroll”
Traditional_Chinese: 取得「卷軸碎片」

English: A Good Friend Is… 1
Traditional_Chinese: 好朋友就是……1

English: Adventurer, do you have a moment? It’s about my daughter. Lately she’s been sneaking out of the village, and she refuses to tell us anything at home.
Traditional_Chinese: 冒險者，你有空嗎？是關於我女兒的事。最近她總是偷偷跑出村子，在家裡也不肯說自己到底在做什麼。

English: Could you check on her? I’d be relieved if it’s nothing, but something about this feels wrong. Please, I’m begging you.
Traditional_Chinese: 你能幫我去看看她嗎？如果什麼事都沒有我也能放心，但我總覺得這件事不太對勁。拜託你了，我求你。

English: If you’re too busy, I understand. Where could she have gone this time…
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你太忙，我也能理解。她這次到底跑去哪裡了……

English: I’m not sure where exactly, but it looks like she’s been going outside the village.
Traditional_Chinese: 我也不確定具體位置，但看起來她最近常往村外跑。

English: My parents sent you?
Traditional_Chinese: 我父母派你來的？

English: Meet with Kaela
Traditional_Chinese: 與凱菈會面

English: A Good Friend Is… 2
Traditional_Chinese: 好朋友就是……2

English: Ha, they barely know me better than some stranger, and now they suddenly care? Huh… Outside? Did I say something about that? No… I don’t remember.
Traditional_Chinese: 哈，他們對我還不如對陌生人了解，現在倒突然關心起來了？哼……村外？我有說過那種事嗎？沒有啊……我不記得了。

English: Ugh, fine, whatever. Yeah, I’ve been hanging out with the wolves. The other kids here don’t get me, and this village is doomed sooner or later. What’s the point? If you want to drag me back, then deal with all my friends first.
Traditional_Chinese: 唉，好啦，隨便你。對，我最近都和那些狼混在一起。這裡的其他小孩根本不懂我，這個村子遲早也會完蛋。有什麼意義？如果你想把我拖回去，就先把我那些朋友全部解決掉吧。

English: Hah! Chickened out already?
Traditional_Chinese: 哈！你已經打退堂鼓了？

English: If you can’t do it, just pretend you never saw me and walk away.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你做不到，就當從沒見過我，直接走開。

English: I-I’m sorry… Just… please don’t hurt me…
Traditional_Chinese: 我、我知道錯了……拜託……不要傷害我……

English: Kill 5 Captain Kyouchish and obtain 1 “Lycan Orders”
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 5 隻丘奇什隊長，並取得 1 份「萊坎命令書」。

English: A Good Friend Is… 3
Traditional_Chinese: 好朋友就是……3

English: W-What? I said I was wrong already. What now? You want me to read this?
Traditional_Chinese: 什、什麼？我不是都已經說我錯了嗎。現在又怎樣？你要我看這個？

English: Fine, hand it over.
Traditional_Chinese: 好啦，拿來吧。

English: What do you want now?
Traditional_Chinese: 你現在又想幹嘛？

English: Alright, alright, I’m reading it.
Traditional_Chinese: 好啦好啦，我在看了。

English: “Find a foolish child, play along, and turn them into a perfect puppet to sow chaos in the village.” So I was just a piece in their stupid game…? Ugh… I can’t believe I fell for it. You want me to go home and apologize to my parents? Tch, I already know that much.
Traditional_Chinese: 「找到愚蠢的孩子，陪她演戲，將她變成在村中散播混亂的完美傀儡。」所以我只是他們那場蠢遊戲裡的一顆棋子……？可惡……我竟然真的上當了。你要我回家向爸媽道歉？嘖，這我自己也知道。

English: Bring “Lycan Orders” to Kaela
Traditional_Chinese: 把「萊坎命令書」交給凱菈。

English: New Survivor of the Expedition? 1
Traditional_Chinese: 遠征隊的新倖存者？1

English: Oh, adventurer, do you have a moment? You’re looking for traces of the vanished expedition, right?
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，冒險者，你有空嗎？你正在尋找失蹤遠征隊留下的痕跡，對吧？

English: While hunting, I found tracks that didn’t belong to Myurang or Lycan. Interested?
Traditional_Chinese: 我打獵時發現了一些不屬於繆朗族也不屬於萊坎的足跡。有興趣嗎？

English: Here, I’ll mark the spot for you.
Traditional_Chinese: 來，我幫你把地點標出來。

English: No worries. I’ll keep a record of it, so come back whenever you want the location again.
Traditional_Chinese: 別擔心，我會先把這裡記下來，如果你之後還想再確認位置，隨時回來找我。

English: Did you forget where it is?
Traditional_Chinese: 你忘記地點了嗎？

English: Well… that’s not exactly what I saw, but…
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯……這和我看到的不太一樣，不過……

English: Obtain a “Pitch-black Sphere”
Traditional_Chinese: 取得「漆黑球體」

English: New Survivor of the Expedition? 2
Traditional_Chinese: 遠征隊的新倖存者？2

English: No matter how I look at it, those tracks aren’t ours, and they don’t match those wolf fiends either.
Traditional_Chinese: 不管我怎麼看，那些足跡都不是我們的，也和那些狼崽子對不上。

English: I don’t think there’s much more I can tell you. Maybe ask someone who actually knows about the expedition. See if anyone recognizes this.
Traditional_Chinese: 我想我也沒辦法再告訴你更多了。也許你該去問真正了解遠征隊的人。看看有沒有人認得這個。

English: I doubt anyone in this village could help.
Traditional_Chinese: 我不覺得這個村裡有人幫得上忙。

English: Do you have someone in mind?
Traditional_Chinese: 你心裡有人選嗎？

English: Was something like this among the expedition supplies?
Traditional_Chinese: 這種東西是在遠征隊的補給裡出現過的嗎？

English: New Survivor of the Expedition? 3
Traditional_Chinese: 遠征隊的新倖存者？3

English: No… I’ve never seen anything like this. Everything that was on the ship is listed here, and there’s nothing even close to this strange object.
Traditional_Chinese: 沒有……我從來沒看過這種東西。船上載運的所有物資都列在這裡，而這份清單裡完全沒有任何接近這件奇怪物品的東西。

English: Hmm… this doesn’t look ordinary. You should ask a historian.
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯……這看起來很不尋常。你應該去問歷史學家。

English: Let’s see… Who might know about something like this…
Traditional_Chinese: 讓我想想……會有誰知道這種東西呢……

English: It looks like the expedition really was wiped out. There’s nothing left of them.
Traditional_Chinese: 看來那支遠征隊真的被徹底消滅了。什麼都沒剩下。

English: Where did you find this? The seal is still intact, so that’s good—but this artifact is dangerous. For now, you’re not ready to know more. Get stronger, and I’ll tell you when the time is right.
Traditional_Chinese: 你在哪裡找到這個的？封印還是完好的，這倒是件好事——但這個遺物很危險。現在的你還沒準備好知道更多。先變得更強，等時機到了我自然會告訴你。

English: Meet with [Historian] Martinyc
Traditional_Chinese: 與 [歷史學家] 馬特尼提特會面

English: Searching for Parents 1
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找父母 1

English: Do you have a moment? I’ve seen how much you’ve helped the village, so I was hoping you could help me too.
Traditional_Chinese: 你現在有空嗎？我看見你幫了村裡這麼多，所以我也想請你幫我一個忙。

English: My grandfather is the jarl, but my father was exiled and sent on a mission… he never returned. I fear they sent him to die. Please help me find his remains.
Traditional_Chinese: 我的祖父是領主，但我的父親被流放後又被派去執行任務……從此再也沒有回來。我懷疑他們是故意送他去死的。拜託你幫我找到他的遺骸。

English: I see… then I’ll have to go alone. Thank you for at least listening.
Traditional_Chinese: 我明白了……那我就只能自己去了。至少還是謝謝你願意聽我說。

English: His last known destination… was there.
Traditional_Chinese: 他最後已知的目的地……就在那裡。

English: Father… in the end…
Traditional_Chinese: 父親……最後竟然……

English: Obtain “???’s Serial Chain”
Traditional_Chinese: 取得「??? 的序列鎖鏈」

English: Searching for Parents 2
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找父母 2

English: But… was that all? He loved writing things down. There must be something more.
Traditional_Chinese: 可是……就只有這些嗎？他一向很喜歡留下文字紀錄。一定還有別的東西。

English: Thank you so much. Anything you can find—no matter how small—would mean the world to me.
Traditional_Chinese: 真的非常謝謝你。不管你能找到什麼——哪怕只是一點點——對我來說都無比重要。

English: It’s alright. You’ve already done a lot. But if you ever change your mind, please come back.
Traditional_Chinese: 沒關係。你已經幫了很多了。不過如果你改變主意，請一定再回來。

English: There’s really nothing else? Ah…
Traditional_Chinese: 真的沒有別的了嗎？啊……

English: This handwriting… it’s definitely my father’s. Thank you so much. It looks like he tried to write in code. I need to decode it right away.
Traditional_Chinese: 這字跡……肯定是我父親的。真的非常謝謝你。看起來他曾試著用暗號寫下內容。我得立刻去把它解開。

English: Obtain “???’s Diary”
Traditional_Chinese: 取得「??? 的日記」

English: To the Jarl
Traditional_Chinese: 前往 [族長] 雅爾

English: So, you’re that adventurer. Thanks to you, the village is finally settling down. Because of that—or maybe because he suddenly has time—the jarl wants to meet you. I’ll put in a good word, so go see him when you can.
Traditional_Chinese: 所以，你就是那個冒險者啊。多虧有你，村子終於安定下來了。也因為如此——或者說，也許是因為他突然有空了——領主想見你。我會替你美言幾句，等你有空就去見他吧。

English: If your people want to form ties with our village, you’ll need his approval anyway.
Traditional_Chinese: 不管怎樣，如果你們那邊的人想和我們村子建立聯繫，就一定得得到他的批准。

English: Well then, come back when you’re free.
Traditional_Chinese: 那麼，等你有空再回來吧。

English: You still haven’t gone? He may be an old man with little to do, but you should probably hurry.
Traditional_Chinese: 你還沒去嗎？他雖然只是個沒什麼事做的老頭，但你最好還是快一點。

English: So, you’re the adventurer I’ve heard so much about.
Traditional_Chinese: 所以，你就是那位傳聞中的冒險者。

English: Obtain “???’s Serial Diary”
Traditional_Chinese: 取得「??? 的連續日記」

English: Prelude to the Counterattack
Traditional_Chinese: 反擊的前奏

English: Thanks to you, we were finally able to breathe. And those Lycans… they never imagined an adventurer would appear, so now they’re on the back foot. This is our chance. Will you help us?
Traditional_Chinese: 多虧有你，我們總算能喘口氣。而那些萊坎……他們從沒想過會有冒險者出現，所以現在反而陷入劣勢。這是我們的機會。你願意幫我們嗎？

English: Before we start a full-scale battle, I need you to deal with the Kanonicus.
Traditional_Chinese: 在正式開戰之前，我需要你先去處理卡諾尼庫斯。

English: I have to admit, your strength is impressive. We can’t afford to let you go just yet.
Traditional_Chinese: 我得承認，你的實力令人印象深刻。我們現在可還不能就這樣放你走。

English: The enemy’s gathering point is here.
Traditional_Chinese: 敵人的集結地就在這裡。

English: Hahaha! The war against the Lycans is ours to win now. We owe you a great deal.
Traditional_Chinese: 哈哈哈！和萊坎的戰爭現在總算看見勝機了。我們欠你太多了。

English: Kill 40 Kanonicus
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 40 隻 追獵者庫斯

English: Pursuit
Traditional_Chinese: 追擊

English: Thanks to your work, we launched a surprise attack and sent them running. We even found some who couldn’t keep up. Would you finish them off and send them to their gods?
Traditional_Chinese: 多虧你的努力，我們發動了奇襲，成功把他們打得潰不成軍。甚至還找到一些掉隊的傢伙。你能去收拾掉他們，送他們去見自己的神嗎？

English: We’re moving to chase down the main force.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們正準備繼續追擊主力部隊。

English: But we don’t have spare troops to deal with the stragglers.
Traditional_Chinese: 但我們沒有多餘兵力去處理那些落單者。

English: Perfect. We’ll leave them to you and continue the pursuit.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。那些就交給你了，我們繼續追擊。

English: Oh, you did it?
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，你做到了？

English: Kill 10 Captain Kanonicus
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 10 隻 追獵者庫斯頭目

English: Mission Failed
Traditional_Chinese: 任務失敗

English: It’s embarrassing to admit, but… unlike you, we failed. We tried to trap them in a tight spot and wipe them out, but a mage suddenly appeared. Those beasts shouldn’t be capable of magic.
Traditional_Chinese: 說出來很丟臉，但是……和你不同，我們失敗了。我們本想把他們逼進死角一舉殲滅，結果突然出現了一個法師。那些野獸本不該會使用魔法才對。

English: We need to regroup our forces, so… could you handle them in our place?
Traditional_Chinese: 我們得先重新整隊，所以……你能替我們處理掉他們嗎？

English: I understand. If you change your mind, please come back.
Traditional_Chinese: 我明白了。如果你改變主意，請再回來。

English: Thank you. We’ll wait for good news.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你。我們會等你的好消息。

English: Excellent work.
Traditional_Chinese: 做得很好。

English: Kill 30 Small Mage Redclouds
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 30 隻小型紅雲法師

English: Back to Town
Traditional_Chinese: 返回城鎮

English: The Lycans resisted fiercely, so the jarl has returned to town for now.
Traditional_Chinese: 萊坎的抵抗非常激烈，因此領主暫時先回城了。

English: Let’s go back as well. I was ordered to wait here and report to you when you returned.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們也回去吧。我奉命在這裡等你，等你回來時向你報告。

English: If you have other business, feel free to handle it first. Nothing around here is a real threat to you anymore.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你還有其他事情要辦，也可以先去處理。這附近已經沒有什麼能真正威脅到你了。

English: The jarl? He’s probably back at the town quarters.
Traditional_Chinese: [族長] 雅爾 嗎？他大概回到城鎮駐地了。

English: I can’t thank you enough for everything.
Traditional_Chinese: 我真的不知道該怎麼感謝你才好。

English: Meet with the Jarl
Traditional_Chinese: 與領主會面

English: Covering Fire
Traditional_Chinese: 掩護射擊

English: I know you just got back, but could I ask a favor? An elder leading our retreat requested reinforcements. Can you go help them escape safely?
Traditional_Chinese: 我知道你才剛回來，但能再拜託你一件事嗎？有位長老率隊掩護撤退時請求援軍。你能去幫他們安全脫身嗎？

English: That’s a relief. Thank you.
Traditional_Chinese: 那真是太好了。謝謝你。

English: It won’t be easy, but you’re the only one I can send. It’s troubling.
Traditional_Chinese: 這絕不容易，但現在我能派去的人只有你。真讓人煩惱。

English: The elder should be waiting for you there.
Traditional_Chinese: 那位長老應該正在那裡等你。

English: Who’s there? Come out and identify yourself!
Traditional_Chinese: 是誰在那裡？出來，報上名來！

English: Meet with [Elder] Silar
Traditional_Chinese: 與 [長老] 西拉會面

English: Conflicted Orders
Traditional_Chinese: 矛盾的命令

English: Ah, you must be the adventurer. What brings you here? Reinforcements? I never sent such a request. Who told you that?
Traditional_Chinese: 啊，你就是那位冒險者。你來這裡做什麼？援軍？我可從沒發出過這種請求。是誰告訴你的？

English: (Wolf howls) What was that? Is someone out there?
Traditional_Chinese: (狼嚎聲) 那是什麼？外面有人嗎？

English: What is that man thinking…? He’s always been suspicious.
Traditional_Chinese: 那個人到底在想什麼……他一直都很可疑。

English: Why aren’t you checking the situation outside? What’s going on?
Traditional_Chinese: 你為什麼還不去看看外面的狀況？到底發生什麼事了？

English: No, outside…! A whole group of Lycan mages appeared out of nowhere.
Traditional_Chinese: 不，外面……！有一整群萊坎法師憑空冒了出來。

English: Meet with [Eillun Guard] Dreon
Traditional_Chinese: 與 [艾爾倫守衛] 德瑞恩會面

English: Chaos
Traditional_Chinese: 混亂

English: We’ve been covering our tracks while retreating. There’s no way the Lycans should’ve found us. We’ll hold as long as we can. Please, report our situation to the elder.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們一路撤退時都有掩蓋行蹤，萊坎不可能找到我們。我們會盡可能撐住。拜託你，去把這裡的情況回報給長老。

English: Grr… Huh… Please hurry!
Traditional_Chinese: 咕……哈……快一點……

English: Please! We can’t last much longer alone.
Traditional_Chinese: 拜託！我們單靠自己已經撐不了多久了。

English: We won’t hold out for long.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們撐不了太久。

English: The Lycans… are they swarming again?
Traditional_Chinese: 那些萊坎……又湧上來了嗎？

English: Trap
Traditional_Chinese: 陷阱

English: Something has gone terribly wrong. We’ve clearly walked into a trap. The jarl may be shady, but he wouldn’t abandon his own people… or would he? Where did the information leak?
Traditional_Chinese: 事情嚴重出錯了。我們顯然是踏進了陷阱。領主雖然可疑，但他真的會拋下自己人不管嗎……還是說，真的會？情報究竟是從哪裡外洩的？

English: For now, we need to deal with the enemies in front of us. Can I count on you?
Traditional_Chinese: 現在只能先處理眼前的敵人了。你願意幫我們嗎？

English: Thank you. We’ll talk more after this is over.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你。等這件事結束後，我們再詳談。

English: Hmph… but we don’t really have another choice.
Traditional_Chinese: 哼……但我們現在也沒有別的選擇了。

English: If you take down a few, the rest will fall apart. Their patterns are predictable.
Traditional_Chinese: 只要你先解決掉幾個，剩下的就會潰散。他們的行動模式很容易預測。

English: Kill 20 Mage Redclouds
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 20 隻 緋雲術士

English: Again, the Town
Traditional_Chinese: 再次回到城鎮

English: Thinking about it… those Lycans are mages. They might have tracked us with some kind of magic. Or… maybe the jarl really did abandon us.
Traditional_Chinese: 仔細想想……那些萊坎是法師。他們可能是用某種魔法追蹤到了我們。又或者……真的是領主拋棄了我們。

English: One of our scouts reported a pack of Lycans heading toward the village. Please go help defend it.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們的一名斥候回報，有一群萊坎正朝村莊前進。拜託你去幫忙守村。

English: I’m glad you’ve come.
Traditional_Chinese: 很高興你來了。

English: We might not have much time left.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們可能已經沒有太多時間了。

English: I’ll follow as soon as I can.
Traditional_Chinese: 我一能動身就會立刻跟上。

English: You arrived just in time. Without you, the village would have been in serious danger.
Traditional_Chinese: 你來得正是時候。要不是你，村子恐怕會陷入極大的危險。

English: Kill 20 Captain Mage Redclouds
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 20 隻 緋雲術士頭目

English: Reunion 1
Traditional_Chinese: 重逢 1

English: If we’d tried to hold them off from inside, they probably would’ve broken through. With their forces this weakened, they shouldn’t have many left.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果我們試圖從村裡硬擋，他們大概早就突破了。現在他們兵力已被削弱，應該也不剩多少了。

English: Once things calm down, we’re planning a counterattack. Would you help us again? Oh, and before that, some villagers have been looking for you. They want to thank you personally.
Traditional_Chinese: 等局勢穩定下來後，我們打算發動反擊。你願意再幫我們一次嗎？喔，對了，在那之前，有些村民一直在找你。他們想親自向你道謝。

English: Why don’t you visit [Eillun Guard] Gard first? I heard you helped him a lot—and he might be preparing something big for you.
Traditional_Chinese: 你何不先去見見 [艾爾倫守衛] 加德？我聽說你幫了他很多，而他似乎正在替你準備什麼大驚喜。

English: You’ve done more than enough, so don’t feel pressured.
Traditional_Chinese: 你已經做得夠多了，不必勉強自己。

English: Have you met them yet? Even I don’t know what they’ve prepared for you.
Traditional_Chinese: 你已經去見過他們了嗎？連我都不知道他們替你準備了什麼。

English: You’ve worked incredibly hard. Every battle was tough, but I’m sure you’ll bring us victory again. This isn’t much, but please accept it.
Traditional_Chinese: 你真的辛苦了。每一場戰鬥都很艱難，但我相信你一定還能再次為我們帶來勝利。這份心意雖然不算什麼，還請你收下。

English: Meet with [Eillun Guard] Gard
Traditional_Chinese: 與 [艾爾倫守衛] 加德會面

English: Reunion 2
Traditional_Chinese: 重逢 2

English: Did you enjoy meeting [Eillun Guard] Gard? I wonder who’s waiting for you next.
Traditional_Chinese: 你見過 [艾爾倫守衛] 加德了嗎？我很好奇，接下來等著你的人會是誰。

English: This time it’s Kaela. I don’t know exactly what she’s planning, but I’d say you’re in for something interesting.
Traditional_Chinese: 這次輪到凱菈了。我不太清楚她打算做什麼，不過我想，應該會很有意思。

English: No need to rush—take your time.
Traditional_Chinese: 不用急，慢慢來就好。

English: Have you met her yet? Honestly, I have no idea what she’s up to.
Traditional_Chinese: 你已經見過她了嗎？老實說，我也不知道她到底在打什麼主意。

English: Ugh, I’ve stopped causing trouble for Mom and Dad, so stop looking at me like that.
Traditional_Chinese: 唉，我都已經不再給爸媽添麻煩了，別再用那種眼神看我了。

English: Reunion 3
Traditional_Chinese: 重逢 3

English: Hope you had fun with Kaela. Who do you think is next?
Traditional_Chinese: 希望你和凱菈相處得愉快。你覺得下一個會是誰？

English: Now it’s Livia’s turn. I’m not sure what she has planned either, but I’m sure it’ll be something special.
Traditional_Chinese: 接下來輪到莉薇雅。我不確定她準備了什麼，但我相信一定會很特別。

English: There’s no hurry. Go when you’re ready.
Traditional_Chinese: 不用著急。等你準備好再去吧。

English: Have you met her yet? I really have no idea what’s coming next.
Traditional_Chinese: 你已經去見她了嗎？我真的完全猜不到接下來會發生什麼。

English: So in the end, that turned out to be something completely different… In any case, I can only imagine how much you’ve endured for us, even though we aren’t of the same kind. This is just a small token of our gratitude. Please accept it.
Traditional_Chinese: 所以最後竟然變成了完全不同的一回事……無論如何，即使我們不是同族，我也能想像你替我們承受了多少艱難。這只是一點微不足道的謝意，請收下吧。

English: Meet with Livia
Traditional_Chinese: 與莉薇雅會面

English: Reunion 4
Traditional_Chinese: 重逢 4

English: Well, I think this will be your final visitor. Any guesses who?
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯，我想這應該會是最後一位要見你的人了。你猜猜會是誰？

English: Taila is next. Whatever happens, I have a feeling it will be something meaningful.
Traditional_Chinese: 接下來是泰拉。不管結果如何，我總覺得這會是一件很有意義的事。

English: Don’t feel pressured. Go at your own pace.
Traditional_Chinese: 別覺得有壓力。照自己的步調來就好。

English: Did you meet her? I still don’t know what she’s planning.
Traditional_Chinese: 你去見過她了嗎？我到現在還是不知道她在計畫什麼。

English: Thanks to you, adventurer, I found my parents’ hidden will. My father exposed the jarl’s crimes, and my grandfather had him killed. Branded a traitor, he was nearly murdered. Please avenge them. Take this, and let it fuel your revenge.
Traditional_Chinese: 多虧了你，冒險者，我找到了父母藏起來的遺囑。我的父親揭發了領主的罪行，而我的祖父卻因此下令殺了他。父親被誣為叛徒，差點被害死。拜託你替他們報仇。拿著這個，讓它成為你復仇的力量。

English: Meet with Taila
Traditional_Chinese: 與泰拉會面

English: Chapter 5 The Final Chapter
Traditional_Chinese: 第 5 章 最終章

English: This Is Nothing
Traditional_Chinese: 這根本不算什麼

English: So, you’ve met everyone now? The Lycans are moving faster than we expected. I thought they’d need more time to regroup, but they’re already organizing their forces.
Traditional_Chinese: 所以，你現在已經把所有人都見過了嗎？萊坎的動作比我們預想得還快。我原本以為他們還需要更多時間整備，沒想到已經開始重整軍勢了。

English: If we let them gather any more, things will become much harder. Could you go ahead and disrupt their plans?
Traditional_Chinese: 要是再讓他們繼續集結，局勢會變得更加棘手。你能先過去打亂他們的計畫嗎？

English: Thank you. I couldn’t ask for a more reliable ally.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你。我找不到比你更可靠的盟友了。

English: If we hesitate, everything we’ve built could collapse. I’m counting on you.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果我們猶豫不決，我們至今建立的一切都可能崩潰。我就拜託你了。

English: Here’s where we expect them to be.
Traditional_Chinese: 這裡就是我們推測他們會出現的位置。

English: You’ve done wonderfully.
Traditional_Chinese: 你做得非常好。

English: Kill 30 Small Taiahas
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 30 隻小塔亞哈

English: Toward the Final Battle
Traditional_Chinese: 邁向最終決戰

English: Leave the rest to us.
Traditional_Chinese: 剩下的就交給我們吧。

English: Elder Ayr is urgently looking for you, so you should go see him.
Traditional_Chinese: 長老艾爾正在急著找你，你應該去見他。

English: We can clean up what’s left on our own.
Traditional_Chinese: 剩下的殘局我們自己收拾就行了。

English: I didn’t catch all the details, but it sounded important.
Traditional_Chinese: 我沒有聽清全部細節，但聽起來似乎很重要。

English: Welcome back, adventurer.
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎回來，冒險者。

English: Meet with [Elder] Ayr
Traditional_Chinese: 與 [長老] 艾爾會面

English: Counterattack
Traditional_Chinese: 箭雨

English: I heard from [Captain] Baron that your ambush went well. Thanks to you, the enemy is completely confused. We can’t waste this chance. We’ll launch a diversion. In the meantime, can you handle the Taiaha?
Traditional_Chinese: 我從 [隊長] 巴倫那裡聽說了，你的伏擊非常成功。多虧有你，敵人已經徹底陷入混亂。我們不能浪費這個機會。我們會展開佯攻。在這段期間，你能幫忙處理塔亞哈嗎？

English: That’s reassuring.
Traditional_Chinese: 這樣我就放心了。

English: Hmm. Do you have a different suggestion?
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯？你有別的建議嗎？

English: Good. I’ll be waiting for more good news.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。我會等你的好消息。

English: Excellent work.
Traditional_Chinese: 做得很好。

English: Kill 30 Taiahas
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 30 隻 泰亞哈戰士

English: Traitor
Traditional_Chinese: 叛徒

English: Our operation was a success as well, but… some soldiers say they saw the jarl in the enemy’s camp, retreating with them. Now their morale is shaken.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們的行動同樣成功了，但是……有些士兵說，他們看見領主出現在敵軍營地，還和他們一同撤退。現在大家士氣都動搖了。

English: I knew he was scheming, but to see him betray his own people… This will be our next move.
Traditional_Chinese: 我早知道他心懷鬼胎，但沒想到他竟然真的背叛自己的族人……接下來我們就該這麼做。

English: The soldiers will never fight at full strength while that traitor is free. You must track him down. There will be Lycans along his escape route, including Captain Taiaha, but I doubt they’ll be a problem for you.
Traditional_Chinese: 只要那個叛徒還逍遙法外，士兵們就不可能全力作戰。你必須追上他。他逃跑路線上一定還有萊坎，包括塔亞哈隊長，但我想那對你應該不是問題。

English: Hmm… I may have to send the soldiers instead. If you change your mind, come back.
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯……看來我可能得改派士兵去。如果你改變主意，再回來吧。

English: I’m counting on you. I trust you with this mission.
Traditional_Chinese: 這次任務就拜託你了。我相信你。

English: Thank you for your efforts, sir. I’m Merk, a scout ordered to track the traitor by the Elder.
Traditional_Chinese: 感謝你的努力，閣下。我是默克，奉長老之命追蹤那名叛徒的斥候。

English: Meet with [Eillun Scout] Merk
Traditional_Chinese: 與 [艾爾倫斥候] 默克會面

English: Bad News
Traditional_Chinese: 壞消息

English: The Lycan forces keep growing, and their numbers make it hard to get close. I… lost sight of the target. This area is under Chief Keokuk’s direct control, so getting any closer is almost impossible.
Traditional_Chinese: 萊坎的兵力持續增加，數量太多，讓人難以接近。我……跟丟了目標。這一帶由酋長奇奧庫克直接掌控，想再靠近幾乎是不可能的。

English: The fact that the traitor went this far suggests they’re more closely allied than we thought. In any case, we’ll have to defeat this enemy to uncover any proof.
Traditional_Chinese: 那個叛徒竟然一路逃到這裡，表示他們之間的關係比我們想像的還要緊密。無論如何，我們都得先擊敗這個敵人，才能找到任何證據。

English: Thank you. Once you secure evidence, I think you should return to the Elder.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你。等你取得證據後，我想你應該回去見長老。

English: This is the best plan I can think of. Do you have a better one?
Traditional_Chinese: 這是我目前能想到最好的辦法。你有更好的主意嗎？

English: I’ll be waiting.
Traditional_Chinese: 我會在這裡等你。

English: Aside from the jarl, this war is finally over. With that stinking giant defeated, the fighting is truly finished. It took far too long. Thank you for bringing this war to an end.
Traditional_Chinese: 除了那個領主之外，這場戰爭終於結束了。那個臭氣沖天的巨獸一倒下，戰事也真的結束了。花了太久，但總算結束了。謝謝你替我們劃下了句點。

English: Kill 1 Chief Keokuk and obtain “Chief Keokuk’s Notebook”
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 1 名酋長奇奧庫克，並取得「酋長奇奧庫克的筆記本」。

English: The Ever-Turning Vicious Cycle of Blood
Traditional_Chinese: 永不停息的血之惡性循環

English: Chief Keokuk had this? What madness. So this war was just a game played by him and the traitor…
Traditional_Chinese: 酋長奇奧庫克竟然持有這個？太瘋狂了。所以這場戰爭，從頭到尾都只是他和那個叛徒之間的一場遊戲……

English: The Lycans worship the demon Ankou as their god. The traitor must have made a deal, selling us out to fuel this war. To fully summon a demon, a great amount of blood is required.
Traditional_Chinese: 狼人把惡魔安庫當成神明來崇拜。那個叛徒一定和它做了交易，出賣我們才讓這場戰爭一直打下去。要完全召喚出惡魔，需要巨量的鮮血作為祭品。

English: According to the note you brought, they’ve already attempted the summoning, but it’s incomplete. Their final goal must be to complete that abomination.
Traditional_Chinese: 根據你帶回來的筆記，他們已經試著進行召喚，但還沒有完成。他們最終的目的，一定是完成那個可憎的怪物。

English: At the edge of the continent lies Ankou’s sealed asylum. If the traitor is there, it’s up to you whether to kill him or bring him back. Please, put an end to this insanity.
Traditional_Chinese: 大陸邊緣就是安庫的封印幽禁所。如果叛徒躲在那裡，是殺了他還是把他帶回來，由你來決定。拜託了，結束這場瘋狂吧。

English: You are a hero of Muran. You must finish this. If this continues, the whole continent will be soaked in blood.
Traditional_Chinese: 你是穆蘭的英雄。這件事必須由你來終結。要是任其發展，整片大陸都會被鮮血淹沒。

English: You’ve already done so much, but if I may, I’d like to ask you once more.
Traditional_Chinese: 你已經做了太多，但如果可以的話，我想再拜託你最後一次。

English: I pray this ends without more tragedy.
Traditional_Chinese: 願這一切不再帶來更多悲劇。

English: So… you’ve come all the way here.
Traditional_Chinese: 所以……你一路追到這裡來了。

English: Go to Ankou’s Asylum
Traditional_Chinese: 前往安庫幽禁所

English: Climax
Traditional_Chinese: 高潮

English: Do I look pathetic to you? A traitor, betrayed and left to die… What would an outsider like you understand? Do you have any idea how much torment I’ve endured to get this far? No, explaining is pointless. In the end, we all meet the same fate.
Traditional_Chinese: 你覺得我很可憐嗎？一個叛徒，被背叛、被丟下等死……像你這種外人又懂什麼？你知道我一路撐到現在，忍受了多少折磨嗎？不，解釋也沒意義。到頭來，我們所有人都會迎來同樣的結局。

English: Go on. Ankou will give you peace. My granddaughter wanted revenge? Ha. I lost my wife long ago and never had a child—how could I have a granddaughter? Kuhuhu… so even you… (dies)
Traditional_Chinese: 繼續吧。安庫會賜予你安寧的。我孫女想要復仇？哈。我早就沒了妻子，也沒生過孩子——哪來的孫女？庫呼呼……原來連你也是…… (斷氣)

English: What’s wrong? Are you afraid now that you have to face a demon? It’s too late for that.
Traditional_Chinese: 怎麼了？現在要面對惡魔了，你害怕了嗎？已經太遲了。

English: (He’s dead.)
Traditional_Chinese: (他死了。)

English: What happened? Is Ankou defeated? The handwriting on this page… so the traitor is gone as well.
Traditional_Chinese: 發生了什麼事？安庫被擊敗了嗎？這頁上的筆跡……那叛徒也沒了。

English: Defeat Ankou and obtain “Jarl’s Diary”
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗安庫並取得“雅爾的日誌”

English: Peace at Last?
Traditional_Chinese: 終於和平了嗎？

English: Incredible. It may not have been a fully summoned demon, but you still defeated it. The jarl had a family? He lost his wife ages ago and never had any children.
Traditional_Chinese: 太驚人了。那雖然不是完全召喚出來的惡魔，但你還是打倒了它。領主有家人？他的妻子早在很久以前就死了，而且他從未有過孩子。

English: Whatever the truth, you’ve saved this land from the demon and those filthy beasts. You have my deepest thanks. Trade with your continent? Of course. I fully support it. I’ll guarantee free passage for anyone coming to our village. Take this approval token.
Traditional_Chinese: 不管真相如何，你都從惡魔和那些骯髒的野獸手中拯救了這片土地。我由衷地感謝你。與你們大陸的貿易？當然，我完全支持。我會保證任何來到我們村的人都能自由通行。拿著這枚批准憑證吧。

English: I’m looking forward to it. I wonder what kind of heroes will come next.
Traditional_Chinese: 我很期待呢。不知道下一位到來的英雄會是什麼樣的人。

English: Still, some formalities must be followed, don’t you think?
Traditional_Chinese: 不過，有些程序還是得照規矩來，不是嗎？

English: Haha. You’re free to use the village facilities whenever you like.
Traditional_Chinese: 哈哈。從今以後，你想什麼時候使用村裡的設施都可以。

English: It’s been a while. How goes your exploration of the New Continent? You’ve really been through a lot. You didn’t just chart new lands—you saved an entire town and secured official permission for trade. I’ll see that you’re properly rewarded. Well done.
Traditional_Chinese: 好久不見。你在新大陸的探索進行得如何？你真的經歷了很多。不只是繪製新土地的地圖而已——你還拯救了一整座城鎮，並替雙方貿易取得了正式許可。我會確保你得到應有的獎勵。做得很好。

English: New Beginning
Traditional_Chinese: 新的開始

English: So, how was the New Continent? And this… what is it? Hmm… a document I’ve never seen before. This alone isn’t enough to understand it. Could you find more of these?
Traditional_Chinese: 所以，新大陸怎麼樣？還有這個……是什麼？嗯……這是一份我從沒見過的文書。光靠這一份，還不足以理解它。你能再去找更多這類文件嗎？

English: From the look of it, I’d say there are at least three more. We’ll need all of them to figure it out.
Traditional_Chinese: 照這情況看來，至少還有三份。我們得全部找齊才行。

English: Sigh… I suppose there’s no other choice.
Traditional_Chinese: 唉……看來也沒有別的辦法了。

English: He should still be there.
Traditional_Chinese: 他應該還在那裡。

English: Hmm…
Obtain 4 different “Torn Scrolls”
Traditional_Chinese: 取得 4 種不同的「破損卷軸」

English: Lost in the Fog
Traditional_Chinese: 迷失於濃霧之中

English: I thought I could decipher it, but there are unknown characters mixed in. I’ve heard rumors of someone who might understand this sort of thing. Would you be willing to find him?
Traditional_Chinese: 我原本以為自己能解讀它，但裡面混雜著我不認得的文字。我聽說有個人或許懂這類東西。你願意去找他嗎？

English: There’s a large island near Flarine. He should be somewhere around there.
Traditional_Chinese: 布拉里斯附近有一座大島。他應該就在那一帶。

English: Unfortunately, I can’t think of any better option.
Traditional_Chinese: 很遺憾，我現在想不到更好的辦法。

English: I don’t know the exact location myself—just what I’ve heard.
Traditional_Chinese: 我也不知道確切地點，只是聽說而已。

English: It’s been a while. What brings you here? You found this in Kaillun? I’m Muran as well, though I left my tribe long ago. I can’t say much, but will you hand that over? It’s about summoning a god and speeding up the tower’s completion. Take this as thanks.
Traditional_Chinese: 好久不見。你來這裡做什麼？你是在凱倫找到這個的？我也是穆蘭族，不過早就離開部族了。我不能說太多，但你願意把那個交給我嗎？這和召喚神明、加速高塔完成有關。這個就當作謝禮吧。

English: Meet with “[Mysterious] ???”
Traditional_Chinese: 與 [神秘人] ??? 會面

English: Kaillun Daily Quests
Traditional_Chinese: 凱倫每日任務

English: Lost your chain again?
Traditional_Chinese: 你的鎖鏈又弄丟了嗎？

English: Could you help me, sir? That thing stole my belongings again. I’ll be punished if I don’t get my serial number chain back. Please help me.
Traditional_Chinese: 你能幫幫我嗎，先生？那東西又把我的東西偷走了。如果我拿不回編號鎖鏈，我會被處罰的。拜託你幫幫我。

English: Oh gods, thank you.
Traditional_Chinese: 喔，天啊，謝謝你。

English: Think of it as helping the dead, just this once… Please, I beg you.
Traditional_Chinese: 就當作是幫死者一個忙……拜託，我求你了。

English: Have you retrieved it yet? Ah, not yet, I see.
Traditional_Chinese: 你拿回來了嗎？啊，原來還沒有。

English: I can’t thank you enough.
Traditional_Chinese: 我真的不知道該怎麼感謝你。

English: Kill 50 Small Hundur Sharpfoots and obtain 1 Abandoned Serial Number Chain
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 50 隻小型百夏足怪，獲得 1 條廢棄序號鏈

English: Clearing the Area
Traditional_Chinese: 清理區域

English: There are so many Captain Kyouchish around that I can’t rest in peace. Could you take care of them?
Traditional_Chinese: 到處都是丘奇什隊長，害我連安息都做不到。你能去處理掉牠們嗎？

English: Thank you. I heard their howls coming from that way.
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你。我聽見牠們的嚎叫聲是從那個方向傳來的。

English: You’re the only one I can rely on.
Traditional_Chinese: 現在我只能依靠你了。

English: I’m counting on you, sir.
Traditional_Chinese: 先生，就拜託你了。

English: Now I can finally rest easy until the next ship arrives. Thank you.
Traditional_Chinese: 現在總算能安心休息，直到下一艘船抵達了。謝謝你。

English: Kill 30 Captain Kyouchish
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 30 隻 利爪奇什頭目

English: Honor of a Warrior 1
Traditional_Chinese: 戰士的榮耀 1

English: If you call yourself a warrior of Kaillun, taking down Hundur Sharpfoots is just a warm-up. Want to prove yourself?
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你自詡為凱倫的戰士，那麼擊敗百夏足只是熱身而已。想證明自己嗎？

English: Alright, then. Take care of those beasts and come back.
Traditional_Chinese: 好，那就這樣。去處理掉那些野獸，然後回來吧。

English: If it’s too much, don’t push yourself. Cleaning up reckless fools is more work than it’s worth.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果太勉強，就不要硬撐。替那些魯莽的傻瓜收拾殘局，根本不值得賠上自己。

English: Good. This shouldn’t take you long.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。這對你來說應該花不了太久。

English: Great job. Now I can truly call you a warrior.
Traditional_Chinese: 做得好。現在我總算能真正稱你為戰士了。

English: Kill 50 Hundur Sharpfoots
Traditional_Chinese: 獵殺 50 隻百夏足

English: Honor of a Warrior 2
Traditional_Chinese: 戰士的榮耀 2

English: For a seasoned warrior, the real challenge is Captain Hundur Sharpfoot. Think you’re ready?
Traditional_Chinese: 對於身經百戰的戰士來說，真正的挑戰是百夏足頭目。你覺得自己準備好了嗎？

English: You already know how this works. No need for me to explain.
Traditional_Chinese: 你已經知道這要怎麼做了，不用我再多解釋。

English: If you’re busy, that’s fine. The challenge isn’t going anywhere.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你很忙也沒關係。這個挑戰又不會跑掉。

English: I’ll be looking forward to seeing what you can do.
Traditional_Chinese: 我很期待看看你能做到什麼程度。

English: I knew I judged you correctly. From now on, you’re an elite warrior of our village.
Traditional_Chinese: 我就知道自己沒看錯你。從現在起，你就是我們村裡的精銳戰士了。

English: Kill 30 Captain Hundur Sharpfoots
Traditional_Chinese: 獵殺 30 隻百夏足頭目

English: Guard’s Request 1
Traditional_Chinese: 守衛的委託 1

English: Small Samosets are pests that constantly bother our guards. Can you handle them and lighten our workload?
Traditional_Chinese: 小薩莫賽特老是騷擾我們的守衛。你能去收拾牠們，減輕我們的負擔嗎？

English: Thank you. You know where they are, right?
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你。你知道牠們在哪裡，對吧？

English: If you’re busy, we’ll figure something out on our own.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你忙，我們會自己想辦法。

English: For someone like you, this should be nothing.
Traditional_Chinese: 對你這樣的人來說，這根本不算什麼。

English: I knew you were the right one to ask. Our work just got much easier thanks to you. I really appreciate it.
Traditional_Chinese: 我就知道找你準沒錯。多虧有你，我們的工作輕鬆多了。真的很感激你。

English: Kill 50 Small Samosets
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 50 隻小薩莫賽特

English: Guard’s Request 2
Traditional_Chinese: 守衛的委託 2

English: Samosets have been swarming the grasslands lately, making patrols difficult. Could you thin them out a bit?
Traditional_Chinese: 最近薩莫賽特在草原上四處出沒，讓巡邏變得很困難。你能幫忙削減一點牠們的數量嗎？

English: Thank you. You know where to find them, don’t you?
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你。你知道去哪裡找牠們，對吧？

English: If you’ve got other priorities, we understand. We’ll manage.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你還有別的優先事項，我們也能理解。我們會自己想辦法。

English: This should be an easy job for you.
Traditional_Chinese: 這對你來說應該是件輕鬆的工作。

English: I knew I could rely on you. You’ve made our work much easier. Truly, thank you.
Traditional_Chinese: 我就知道能依靠你。你讓我們的工作輕鬆多了，真的很謝謝你。

English: Kill 50 Samosets
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 50 隻 薩莫塞特

English: Guard’s Request 3
Traditional_Chinese: 守衛的委託 3

English: Those Captain Samosets keep slipping into the forest. Could you clear some of them out?
Traditional_Chinese: 那些薩莫賽特隊長老是溜進森林裡。你能去清掉一些嗎？

English: We’re grateful for your help. You know the area well enough to track them, right?
Traditional_Chinese: 非常感謝你的幫助。你對那一帶已經夠熟，知道怎麼追蹤牠們了吧？

English: If you don’t have time, we’ll deal with it somehow.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你沒空，我們也只能自己處理了。

English: This should be a simple task for you.
Traditional_Chinese: 這對你來說應該只是小事一樁。

English: I knew I could count on you. You’ve helped us a lot. Thanks.
Traditional_Chinese: 我就知道可以指望你。你幫了我們很多，謝謝。

English: Kill 30 Captain Samosets
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 30 隻 薩莫塞特頭目

English: Guard’s Request 4
Traditional_Chinese: 守衛的委託 4

English: Small Kyouchish are getting out of control and causing trouble. We could really use your help cutting their numbers.
Traditional_Chinese: 小丘奇什已經越來越失控，到處惹麻煩。我們真的很需要你幫忙削減牠們的數量。

English: I appreciate it. You won’t have any trouble finding them, right?
Traditional_Chinese: 感謝你。要找到牠們，對你來說不會有問題吧？

English: If you’re busy with something else, don’t worry. We’ll handle it.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你正忙著別的事，也不用擔心。我們會自己處理。

English: This should be no challenge for you.
Traditional_Chinese: 這對你來說應該毫無挑戰性。

English: I was right to trust you. You’ve made our job much easier. Thank you.
Traditional_Chinese: 看來我沒信錯你。你讓我們的工作輕鬆多了。謝謝。

English: Kill 50 Small Kyouchish
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 50 隻小丘奇什

English: Guard’s Request 5
Traditional_Chinese: 守衛的委託 5

English: Our guards are worn down dealing with Kyouchish. If you could defeat a few, it’d be a huge help.
Traditional_Chinese: 我們的守衛被丘奇什折騰得精疲力竭。如果你能幫忙擊倒幾隻，會是很大的幫助。

English: Thank you. You know how to find them, right?
Traditional_Chinese: 謝謝你。你知道怎麼找到牠們吧？

English: If you’ve got other plans, it’s alright. We’ll make do.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你另有安排也沒關係。我們會自己想辦法。

English: This should be simple work for someone of your skill.
Traditional_Chinese: 以你的本事，這應該只是小菜一碟。

English: I knew you’d handle it. You’ve made our lives much easier. Truly, thank you.
Traditional_Chinese: 我就知道你辦得到。多虧有你，我們的日子輕鬆多了。真的很謝謝你。

English: Kill 50 Kyouchish
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 50 隻 利爪奇什

English: Elder’s Request 1
Traditional_Chinese: 長老的委託 1

English: It looks like a group of Small Kanonicus are swarming somewhere in the forest. I’ve received complaints from the townsfolk. Could you lend a hand?
Traditional_Chinese: 看來有一群小卡諾尼庫斯正在森林某處大量聚集。我已經收到不少村民的抱怨了。你能幫忙處理嗎？

English: As always, thank you.
Traditional_Chinese: 一如往常，謝謝你。

English: If you have other things to do, I’ll have to send a guard instead.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你還有別的事要做，我就只能改派守衛去了。

English: You know where it is, don’t you?
Traditional_Chinese: 你知道那在哪裡，對吧？

English: You did a great job. Now I can finally tell everyone they’re safe.
Traditional_Chinese: 你做得非常好。現在我終於能告訴大家，他們安全了。

English: Kill 50 Small Kanonicus
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 50 隻小卡諾尼庫斯

English: Elder’s Request 2
Traditional_Chinese: 長老的委託 2

English: I don’t know why, but after you dealt with the small Kanonicus group, their main numbers started increasing. Could you help with this as well?
Traditional_Chinese: 我也不知道為什麼，但在你處理掉那群小卡諾尼庫斯之後，牠們的主力反而開始增加了。這件事你也能幫忙處理嗎？

English: I can’t thank you enough for your help.
Traditional_Chinese: 真不知道該怎麼感謝你才好。

English: If you’re busy, I understand. We’ll manage somehow.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果你忙，我能理解。我們會自己撐過去的。

English: I believe in you. Good luck.
Traditional_Chinese: 我相信你。祝你好運。

English: For now, we can finally enjoy a bit of peace. Well done, truly.
Traditional_Chinese: 至少現在，我們終於能享受片刻安寧了。真的做得很好。

English: Kill 50 Kanonicus
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺 50 隻 追獵者庫斯

English: To Awakening
Traditional_Chinese: 通往覺醒

English: Find the Old Document
Traditional_Chinese: 尋找舊文件

English: Leave This to the Experts
Traditional_Chinese: 這就交給專家吧

English: Let’s Find the Real Clue
Traditional_Chinese: 讓我們找出真正的線索

English: It Will Be Different This Time
Traditional_Chinese: 這次一定會不一樣

English: The Gateway to Awakening
Traditional_Chinese: 覺醒之門

English: The New Beginning
Traditional_Chinese: 新的開始

English: Welcome, adventurer. I can sense great power within you.
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎你，冒險者。我能感覺到你體內蘊藏著強大的力量。

English: Oh ho… this is interesting. It seems your experiences are finally paying off.
Traditional_Chinese: 喔呵……真有意思。看來你的經歷終於開始開花結果了。

English: That power is the foundation of awakening as a transcendent being.
Traditional_Chinese: 那股力量，正是作為超越者覺醒的根基。

English: Anyone can possess it, but few ever reach that realm.
Traditional_Chinese: 任何人都可能擁有它，但真正抵達那個境界的人卻寥寥無幾。

English: I cannot guide you directly, but I know those who can.
Traditional_Chinese: 我無法直接指引你，但我知道有人可以。

English: Good. First, meet [Mercenary Master] Andy.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。先去見 [勇者大師] 安迪凱。

English: Good. First, meet [Magician Master] Hee.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。先去見 [魔法使大師] 喜雷。

English: Good. First, meet [Acrobat Master] Pyre.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。先去見 [雜技大師] 飛蕊。

English: Good. First, meet [Assist Master] Maki.
Traditional_Chinese: 很好。先去見 [神職者大師] 瑪吉。

English: This is the first step toward something much greater. Why hesitate? If you change your mind, you know where to find me.
Traditional_Chinese: 這是邁向更偉大事物的第一步。還有什麼好猶豫的？如果你改變主意，你知道該去哪裡找我。

English: You still haven’t gone to see him? He’s probably waiting impatiently.
Traditional_Chinese: 你還沒去見他嗎？他大概已經等得不耐煩了。

English: You still haven’t gone to see her? She’s probably waiting impatiently.
Traditional_Chinese: 你還沒去見她嗎？她大概已經等得不耐煩了。

English: Long time no see, adventurer.
Traditional_Chinese: 好久不見了，冒險者。

English: Meet [Mercenary Master] Andy.
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [勇者大師] 安迪凱。

English: Meet [Magician Master] Hee.
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [魔法使大師] 喜雷。

English: Meet [Acrobat Master] Pyre.
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [雜技大師] 飛蕊。

English: Meet [Assist Master] Maki.
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [神職者大師] 瑪吉。

English: Yes, I heard everything from Radyon.
Traditional_Chinese: 是的，我已經從雷迪恩那裡聽說了一切。

English: Awakening, huh… from what I can see, you’re already more than ready.
Traditional_Chinese: 覺醒嗎……就我看來，你早就已經準備充分了。

English: If the right opportunity comes, you might be able to awaken.
Traditional_Chinese: 只要時機成熟，你也許就能覺醒。

English: A new area was discovered deep beneath the seas of Coral Island. Adventurers are flocking there, hoping for new discoveries.
Traditional_Chinese: 在珊瑚島海域深處發現了一片新區域。冒險者們正蜂擁而至，希望能有所新發現。

English: Why not dive in? You might find something unique and awaken your true potential.
Traditional_Chinese: 何不潛入一探？你也許會發現獨特之物，並喚醒你真正的潛能。

English: I thought this would be a good chance for you, but so be it. If you change your mind, come back anytime.
Traditional_Chinese: 我原以為這會是個適合你的好機會，但也罷。如果你改變主意，隨時都可以回來找我。

English: You should hurry. If others get there first, there might be nothing left to find.
Traditional_Chinese: 你最好快點。要是被別人搶先一步，可能就什麼都找不到了。

English: It seems you couldn’t awaken this time, but you still did well. Did you find anything?
Traditional_Chinese: 看來你這次沒能覺醒，不過你還是做得很好。你有找到什麼嗎？

English: Find a “Stale Record” from Herneos. People say they’ve seen them near the Small Dorians.
Traditional_Chinese: 在海尼爾遺都找到「Stale Record」。有人說曾在小型多利安附近見過。

English: So, is this your grand discovery?
Traditional_Chinese: 所以，這就是你的重大發現嗎？

English: I don’t know what it is either, but I know someone who might.
Traditional_Chinese: 我也不知道這是什麼，不過我知道可能有人會知道。

English: Go see [Knight Master] Karandur.
Traditional_Chinese: 去找 [騎士首領] 卡拉杜‧愛朋。

English: Go see [Blade Master] Corel.
Traditional_Chinese: 去找 [暗殺者首領] 席瑞兒‧安得利爾。

English: Go see [Elementor Master] Horison.
Traditional_Chinese: 去找 [研術者首領] 赫雷森‧凱列藍。

English: Go see [Psykeeper Master] Cylor.
Traditional_Chinese: 去找 [念力師首領] 賽樂。

English: Go see [Jester Master] Lorein.
Traditional_Chinese: 去找 [操偶大師] 蘿麗安。

English: Go see [Ranger Master] Eliff.
Traditional_Chinese: 去找 [浪人大師] 艾梨布。

English: Go see [Billposter Master] Ride.
Traditional_Chinese: 去找 [爆咒師首領] 瑞得。

English: Go see [Ringmaster Master] Ellend.
Traditional_Chinese: 去找 [守護者首領] 愛嵐‧依莉迪歐。

English: He’s an expert on ancient artifacts. Even if it doesn’t help your awakening, at least it’ll satisfy your curiosity.
Traditional_Chinese: 他是古代遺物方面的專家。就算這對你的覺醒沒有幫助，至少也能滿足你的好奇心。

English: She’s an expert on ancient artifacts. Even if it doesn’t help your awakening, at least it’ll satisfy your curiosity.
Traditional_Chinese: 她是古代遺物方面的專家。就算這對你的覺醒沒有幫助，至少也能滿足你的好奇心。

English: There’s plenty of time. Once you’ve handled your urgent matters, come back. I’ll let them know in advance.
Traditional_Chinese: 時間還很充裕。等你先處理完手邊急事再回來吧。我會先替你知會他們。

English: What are you waiting for? He’s expecting you.
Traditional_Chinese: 你還在等什麼？他正在等你。

English: What are you waiting for? She’s expecting you.
Traditional_Chinese: 你還在等什麼？她正在等你。

English: It’s been a while, adventurer. I already heard from [Mercenary Master] Andy.
Traditional_Chinese: 好久不見了，冒險者。我已經從 [勇者大師] 安迪凱 那裡聽說了。

English: It’s been a while, adventurer. I already heard from [Magician Master] Hee.
Traditional_Chinese: 好久不見了，冒險者。我已經從 [魔法使大師] 喜雷 那裡聽說了。

English: It’s been a while, adventurer. I already heard from [Acrobat Master] Pyre.
Traditional_Chinese: 好久不見了，冒險者。我已經從 [雜技大師] 飛蕊 那裡聽說了。

English: It’s been a while, adventurer. I already heard from [Assist Master] Maki.
Traditional_Chinese: 好久不見了，冒險者。我已經從 [神職者大師] 瑪吉 那裡聽說了。

English: You have something to show me, and you’re searching for clues about awakening?
Traditional_Chinese: 你有東西要給我看，而且你正在尋找關於覺醒的線索？

English: Let me see the item first.
Traditional_Chinese: 先讓我看看那件物品吧。

English: Meet [Knight Master] Karandur.
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [騎士首領] 卡拉杜‧愛朋。

English: Meet [Blade Master] Corel
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [暗殺者首領] 席瑞兒‧安得利爾。

English: Meet [Elementor Master] Horison
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [研術者首領] 赫雷森‧凱列藍。

English: Meet [Psykeeper Master] Cylor
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [念力師首領] 賽樂。

English: Meet [Jester Master] Lorein
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [操偶大師] 蘿麗安。

English: Meet [Ranger Master] Eliff
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [浪人大師] 艾梨布。

English: Meet [Billposter Master] Ride
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [爆咒師首領] 瑞得。

English: Meet [Ringmaster Master] Ellend
Traditional_Chinese: 去見 [守護者首領] 愛嵐‧依莉迪歐。

English: Oh… this has nothing to do with awakening.
Traditional_Chinese: 喔……這和覺醒無關。

English: It says that long ago, all continents were connected, and many races lived together.
Traditional_Chinese: 上面記載著，很久以前所有大陸原本彼此相連，許多種族共同生活在一起。

English: This is exactly the kind of thing the Strange Collector in Saint City loves. He’d be thrilled if you brought it to him.
Traditional_Chinese: 這正是聖城那位怪奇收藏家最喜歡的東西。要是你把它帶給他，他一定會高興壞了。

English: Now then… shall we speak about your awakening?
Traditional_Chinese: 那麼……接下來要談談你的覺醒了嗎？

English: True strength awakens when you fight with your life on the line. It’s always been that way.
Traditional_Chinese: 真正的力量，只有在你賭上性命戰鬥時才會甦醒。自古以來皆是如此。

English: Enter the instance dungeon and defeat $QUEST_END_KILL_COUNT$ $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$s to test your limits.
Traditional_Chinese: 進入副本，擊敗 $QUEST_END_KILL_COUNT$ $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$s，測試自己的極限。

English: Is there another way? Maybe. It’s worth trying whatever you can. If you change your mind, come find me.
Traditional_Chinese: 還有別的方法嗎？也許有。任何可行的方式都值得一試。如果你改變主意，就來找我。

English: You haven’t finished yet? Hmm… I thought you’d be done by now.
Traditional_Chinese: 你還沒完成嗎？嗯……我還以為你現在應該已經做完了。

English: Well done. But you still haven’t awakened? How strange…
Traditional_Chinese: 做得不錯。但你還是沒有覺醒？真奇怪……

English: I know someone who can definitely help—if you’re willing to meet them.
Traditional_Chinese: 我知道有一個人一定能幫上你——前提是你願意去見他。

English: Here, take this letter of introduction.
Traditional_Chinese: 來，拿著這封介紹信。

English: Kill $QUEST_END_KILL_COUNT$ $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$s
Traditional_Chinese: 擊敗 $QUEST_END_KILL_COUNT$ 隻 $QUEST_END_KILL_NAME$

English: He is my master. Since he’s also a transcendent, he should know how.
Traditional_Chinese: 他是我的師父。既然他也是超越者，應該知道該怎麼做。

English: Because of certain circumstances, he doesn’t appear in public, so most people don’t know he exists.
Traditional_Chinese: 因為某些緣故，他不會在眾人面前現身，所以大多數人都不知道他的存在。

English: I just realized I gave you the letter without even hearing your answer.
Traditional_Chinese: 我這才發現，我連你的答覆都還沒聽，就先把信交給你了。

English: Anyway, you don’t know where he is yet, do you? Will you go meet him?
Traditional_Chinese: 總之，你還不知道他在哪裡，對吧？你願意去見他嗎？

English: These days, my master is secretly building a tower. He should still be there.
Traditional_Chinese: 這些日子以來，我的師父一直在秘密建造一座高塔。他現在應該還在那裡。

English: Show him my letter. He won’t ignore it.
Traditional_Chinese: 把我的信拿給他看。他不會置之不理的。

English: Even for me, this is a big favor to ask. If you feel you’re not ready, you can come back later.
Traditional_Chinese: 就連對我來說，這也是個很難開口的請求。如果你覺得自己還沒準備好，之後再回來也行。

English: Go meet him quickly. He’s… a busy man.
Traditional_Chinese: 快去見他吧。他……可是個大忙人。

English: Only a handful of people know I’m here. Who are you, and what do you want?
Traditional_Chinese: 知道我人在這裡的，只有極少數人。你是誰？來這裡有什麼事？

English: Deliver “Master’s Letter of Introduction” to [Mysterious] ???
Traditional_Chinese: 將「師父的介紹信」交給 [神祕人] ???

English: I see… the power inside you isn’t enough to awaken as a transcendent.
Traditional_Chinese: 我明白了……你體內的力量，還不足以讓你覺醒成為超越者。

English: Still, you have the potential to reach a whole new realm.
Traditional_Chinese: 即便如此，你仍然有潛力踏入全新的境界。

English: [Knight Master] Karandur even wrote you a letter of introduction just to send you to me.
Traditional_Chinese: [騎士大師] 卡蘭杜爾甚至還特地寫了介紹信，把你送到我這裡來。

English: [Blade Master] Corel even wrote you a letter of introduction just to send you to me.
Traditional_Chinese: [暗殺者首領] 席瑞兒‧安得利爾甚至還特地寫了介紹信，把你送到我這裡來。

English: [Elementor Master] Horison even wrote you a letter of introduction just to send you to me.
Traditional_Chinese: [元素使大師] 霍里森甚至還特地寫了介紹信，把你送到我這裡來。

English: [Psykeeper Master] Cylor even wrote you a letter of introduction just to send you to me.
Traditional_Chinese: [念力大師] 賽勒甚至還特地寫了介紹信，把你送到我這裡來。

English: [Jester Master] Lorein even wrote you a letter of introduction just to send you to me.
Traditional_Chinese: [操偶師大師] 蘿蕾茵甚至還特地寫了介紹信，把你送到我這裡來。

English: [Ranger Master] Eliff even wrote you a letter of introduction just to send you to me.
Traditional_Chinese: [浪人大師] 艾利夫甚至還特地寫了介紹信，把你送到我這裡來。

English: [Billposter Master] Ride even wrote you a letter of introduction just to send you to me.
Traditional_Chinese: [爆破大師] 萊德甚至還特地寫了介紹信，把你送到我這裡來。

English: [Ringmaster Master] Ellend even wrote you a letter of introduction just to send you to me.
Traditional_Chinese: [神使大師] 艾蘭德甚至還特地寫了介紹信，把你送到我這裡來。

English: But I’m not sure I want to help someone I barely know.
Traditional_Chinese: 但我不確定自己是否願意幫助一個我幾乎不認識的人。

English: Can you do exactly as I say, without question? It’s nothing difficult.
Traditional_Chinese: 你能毫不質疑地照我說的去做嗎？這並不是什麼困難的事。

English: See the orbs scattered around Kaillun? Choose the one that draws you and bring it to me. I need to look into your past.
Traditional_Chinese: 看到散落在凱倫周圍的那些寶珠了嗎？選一顆最吸引你的，把它帶給我。我需要窺探你的過去。

English: I have no regrets about this choice. Think carefully.
Traditional_Chinese: 我不會為這個選擇感到後悔。你好好想清楚。

English: If you can’t even handle this, that sort of power would only weigh you down.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果連這點小事都辦不到，那樣的力量只會成為你的負擔。

English: Hmm… I believe you’ll be fine.
Traditional_Chinese: 嗯……我相信你應該沒問題。

English: I’ll gladly help you open the door to a new realm.
Traditional_Chinese: 我很樂意幫你打開通往全新境界的大門。

English: Stay right where you are.\nIt’s done. I need to rest now, so you may leave.
Traditional_Chinese: 站在原地別動。\n好了。我要休息了，你可以離開了。

English: Get a $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$
Traditional_Chinese: 取得一個 $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$

English: It’s done. Do you feel anything?
Traditional_Chinese: 完成了。你有感覺到什麼嗎？

English: I need to rest, so go back to the sage who sent you here.
Traditional_Chinese: 我要休息了，回去找那位派你來這裡的賢者吧。

English: The ritual definitely worked. Take a bit more time to reflect on yourself, then come to me again.
Traditional_Chinese: 儀式確實成功了。再多花一點時間審視自己，之後再來找我。

English: I said you may go now.
Traditional_Chinese: 我說了，你現在可以走了。

English: Welcome, adventurer. Have you finally awakened?\nThis is my first time seeing a transcendent in person.
Traditional_Chinese: 歡迎你，冒險者。你終於覺醒了嗎？\n這還是我第一次親眼見到超越者。

English: You say you haven’t awakened, yet I can clearly sense your power.\nSo, what happened?
Traditional_Chinese: 你說你還沒有覺醒，但我卻能清楚感受到你的力量。\n所以，到底發生了什麼事？

English: I see. So that’s how it went.\nYou may not have become a transcendent, but I’ll give you a small gift to celebrate your new strength.
Traditional_Chinese: 原來如此，事情是這樣啊。\n雖然你沒有成為超越者，但我還是要送你一份小禮物，慶祝你獲得全新的力量。

English: I look forward to seeing what you do next.
Traditional_Chinese: 我很期待看到你接下來會有什麼作為。

English: Go to [Sage] Radyon
Traditional_Chinese: 去找 [智愚賢者] 雷迪恩

English: Ankou’s Asylum Boss
Traditional_Chinese: 安庫幽禁所首領

English: Hero Grade (4)
Traditional_Chinese: 英雄階級 (4)

English: I need you to reach level 180 and bring $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$. Only a true Hero can do that.
Traditional_Chinese: 我需要你達到 180 級，並帶來 $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$。只有真正的英雄才能做到這件事。

English: Reach level 180 and bring $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$.
Traditional_Chinese: 達到 180 級，並帶來 $QUEST_END_ITEM_COUNT$x $QUEST_END_ITEM_NAME$。

English: Kaillun
Traditional_Chinese: 凱倫

English: Year of the Horse 2026
Retrieve the 4th Anniversary Birthday Banner!
Traditional_Chinese: 尋回四週年生日旗幟！

English: Would you like to participate in our 4th Anniversary event and receive your event banner?
Traditional_Chinese: 你想參加我們的四週年活動，並領取活動旗幟嗎？

English: Great! Talk to me once more, and I'll give you the 4th Anniversary Banner.
Traditional_Chinese: 太好了！再和我對話一次，我就會給你四週年旗幟。

English: No problem. Come back if you want to join the celebration!
Traditional_Chinese: 沒問題。如果你想參加慶祝活動，隨時再回來！

English: Here is your banner. Use it to collect letters and win rewards. Happy Anniversary!
Traditional_Chinese: 這是你的旗幟。用它收集字母並贏得獎勵吧。週年快樂！
